A bit far away from the city center Shoreditch within walking distance 15 mns   Normal Holiday Inn standard good staff Ideal if leaving from London City Airport take the DLR from Shadwell a 10 minutes walk

couldn t get a twin room and the double bed was not really good for me and my mom it was the smallest double bed I ve slept in As a couple I guess if you cuddle it s fine   The hotel is new modern and with large rooms It also looked very clean good bathroom and shower quiet great value for London Location might seem bad cause it s not a rich area but Shadwell station is actually 5 minutes away and gets you to central London very easily Personally I had no trouble walking even alone at night and one time I walked from Whitechapel station which is a bit further away

The location is a bit far from central London which is where most of the tourist attractions are We used Uber and it was very easy but we did waste a bit of time because of the location   Staff was very friendly and helpful I give them top marks for sure There were a couple of minor issues with the room which were attended to very quickly The breakfast buffet was excellent with a lot of variety I would stay here again absolutely

Staff were helpful in booking us a taxi with the company they use to get to the station at a fixed price of 8 Although the meter showed 8 the driver insisted the cost was 10 Not a big deal but was disappointing for a partner company to let the Holiday inn down I paid the 10 but no tips Will definitely stay there next time but will get a black cab which cost us 5 on the way in   Staff friendly and extremely helpful Went out of their way to assist us in every way Great asset to the company

The room was light comfortable with air conditioning making the temperature more than comfortable The room was immaculately clean The staff were polite and friendly and very accommodating a very nice stay
We arrived just after the restaurant closed but the chef went back to the kitchen and made us up some food The reception and bar staff were so friendly and helpful

I thought the price of 204 for a twin room rather steep but I guess that s what you expect in London   Certain tubes were not running near the hotel so getting there was confusing The hotel is modern friendly clean and the food is good The surrounding area is unsuitable for exploring by foot not because of the safety issue but lack of shops and eateries and places of interest

Being too close to the noise of the lift  Bed was really comfy tea and coffee was really welcoming if there was one negative it was being too close to the lift as we could hear it going up and down and doors opening and shutting but would stay here again
Location wasn t the best the photo of westminster bridge was more than a little mis leading suggest people use street view first before choosing this hotel

I am an IHG Platinum Elite level member so usually get upgraded although I hasten to add I don t expect it it s a nice touch for my loyalty On this occasion I was told they were fully booked and that they couldn t do that however they would send a bottle of wine to the room No big deal and I proceeded to my room which was okay At dinner which is next to reception I overheard several guests being told that as Platinum members they were being upgraded Did I not get the upgrade as I d booked through Booking com Dinner Menu is not exhaustive so I ordered chicken and chips 13 95 I think When this arrived it was chicken thighs and a bowl of fries No mention of this on the menu and certainly not good VFM IMHO Still feeling hungry I ordered a dessert and was told my first choice was not available I was slight annoyed as it was only 7 30 in the evening and there were only THREE people in the restaurant I jokingly asked if I d missed the coach party which I think my attempt at british humour went over the waiter s head somewhat When my second choice dessert arrived creme brulee the brulee was just runny sugar syrup so I questioned this and was told that the chef did not have a blow torch Really 133 room hotel in a Central London hotel At this point I left Unfortunately this is not the first time I have experienced this at this particular hotel restaurant having previously being told they did not have any steak Again dining in the restaurant early 7pm with only a handful of diners present On that occasion I had to settle for a burger On leaving the restaurant I went to the bar and ordered a drink As I was paying the waiter from the restaurant kindly gave me this on the house again a good gesture However I could not believe that the half bottle of wine that I had not drank at the table was then placed behind the bar   Great Location for an event I was attending at Tobacco Dock

Staff swiped my card for payment without my consent prior to my checkout dates Hotel is far from city and staff misguided on the location and proximity to city to travel with luggage Unsafe area post sunset   Rooms were clean

Meals in house are awful and terribly over priced 2x curry out of a packet 45 Restaurant was always empty Toilet did not flush properly Shower was of primitive construction for this level of accommodation Slow wi fi Noisy and disturbed night rest because of close proximity of other rooms Airco clicked loudly when thermostat adjusted room temperature Nearest tube train is a good distance and the taxi service provided by the hotel is twice as expensive as the local service   Very friendly and helpful staff Hotel is very clean and welcoming Breakfast was really delicious Free newspapers etc Starbucks coffee in house Interesting part of London

I stayed with my partner for 1 night and it wasnt great when house keeping knocked at half 8 and woke us up by opening the door when we didnt check out untill 12   Staff were very friendly rooms were very clean and tidy and spacious

When we were checking in it was obvious that the person on the desk was not familiar with the check in process We had been delayed for over an hour on our journey and the last thing we needed was to spend half an hour checking in The room we were allocated room 211 was very noisy My wife and I were woken on three occasions during the night by noise from the hotel plumbing We had very little sleep all night   We had an issue with the room we were allocated We raised this issue with the staff and we were moved to a different room The attitude of the staff who dealt with our complaint was very good

Location is the only drawback of this Hotel It is a bit out of Center and takes some 5 10 min to get to the Metrostation Whitchapel There is not much to do right outside the Hotel But in 10 15 min walk towards London Bridge one might already find some nice pubs In the night we prefered to get back to the Hotel on Uber   Wonderfull hotel clean and new Rooms spacious and comfirtable
No pancake to breakfast while the restaurant put up this menu on table My son s morning wasn t good   Personal is perfect everyone have really servicemind

More TV channels would have been nice and a better range of toiletries too I d have like to have able to open the window for some natural air   Lovely staff especially Lola who works in the restaurant she has good banter

There is one point the hotel obviously has no influence on right now I was misled by the name and thought the hotel is close to the Whitechapel tube station it isn t and the walk took me around 15 minutes and I didn t feel very safe due to lots of the minorities living in this part of the city However it is still quite close to Aldgate and the whole business area   very friendly stuff big and clean rooms and bathrooms well equipped even with the iron wonderful breakfasts including milk shakes and pancakes

Clean comfortable spacious room very friendly hotel staff very nice breakfast buffet with good choice for everyone s taste I especially liked the pancakes The hotel is also a good base for exploring London with the Shadwell station nearby Trams to Banks or Tower Gateway every couple of minutes from where you have multiple connections with the London Underground

Hotel is located in an area that is somewhat run down and not necessarily breathes the atmosphere of a friendly environment   Good modern hotel with a high standard and high comfort level Pleasant helpfull staff Excellent breakfast

The area wasn t good We went to a show one of the evenings It was a very dark walk back to the hotel from the train station didn t feel safe If staying here I d recommend you get a taxi  It was very comfortable and staff were very friendly

The area is a little bit dirty difficult operation of air conditioner lack of organized storage to put the clothes out from the suitcase lack of place for suitcases or bag lotion was missing from the bathroom daily   The location close to public transport and walking distance from Tower of London 24 hour working grocery stores in the area

Trying to find parking nearby was horrendous   Staff were very pleasant and would always go out of there way to ensure I was happy The room was lovely clean and spacious Bed was SUPER comfy too Breakfast was superb they even had a machine that made pancakes for you

Breakfast was alright but the sausages were of poor quality   Decent location about 1 km walking distance from Whitechapel station Facilities were good but air circulation in the room had to be manually relegated everytime we reentered the room Friendly accommodating staff Overall well worth the price during our Easter stay

Nothing Perfect stay   Really lovely breakfast with unusual choice of fresh juices Cater really well for vegetarians just asked for veggie sausages and they were particular great not quorn Worth the money lovely friendly staff Upgraded to an executive room that was simply stunning both in decor and size

Wasn t asked if I wanted house cleaning and had to leave the do not disturb door hanger on so they wouldn t   Staff were awesome namely Dennis our bar tender He took extra time during and after his shift to make sure we were happy Perri was super friendly and a joy to be around

breakfast could be better eg better coffee  rooms are very tidy and spacious this hotel is really good price quality It s a 5 min walk to the DLR and there are some good restaurants in walking distance you just need to find them
Nothing   The location is very good You can get to underground stations by ten minutes walking You can reach city centre in 20 minutes at all Bus stop in front of the hotel

The staff are very friendly efficient and kind The breakfast is good The sweet potato fries in the bar were excellent We have no criticisms to make everything works its clean and comfortable the staff are well trained and it runs like clockwork

All good  Really immaculate comfortable hotel in the middle of quite a run down area but it didn t feel threatening to walk back to the hotel late at night the area this hotel is in shows you a different side to London which we really embraced
The Wifi was rather poor and would not connect properly didn t bother the staff about it as was only staying two nights   Overall the hotel was great would stay again for sure

The shower head was hard to position where we wanted it so it remained high or it would flop over This could be easily fixed by the maintenance people though   The swipe access card to access the room worked instantaneously every time The lock system was more responsive than most places we stay so we were very impressed to not have to stuff around with the swipe access The breakfast had a good variety The room was nice and quiet The heating system worked super quietly and very efficiently There were many transport options and we even used the bike hire that was directly across the road It was within walking distance of many restaurants and pubs We had a great stay

Location is middle of no where Booking com said it was 0 5mi from the shard which is why I booked Turned out to be an hour and half walk or an hour car journey due to traffic The local tube was enough to make anyone not want to travel by tube again Hotel prices are ridiculously expensive for the facilities and location If this was more centre London then fair enough but it isn t and made the whole weekend trip more expensive than it needed to be I can t see why there would be any other reason to stay at this hotel   Clean hotel nothing else

The bagel could have been better and the black pudding was dried out  Comfortable bed pillows and hot shower with good pressure also the complimentary upgrade All the staff were friendly helpful and professional

Pillows were too firm and high Asked for a softer pillow but they were exactly the same Still slept fine  Great shower and quiet room on 1st floor Nice ambiance in the lobby with comfortable seating and newspapers magazines and internet access Staff were lovely Bus stop right at hotel and Shadwell DLR 3 min walk

a man who checked us in talked diffinitely too much too quick i coudnt understand what he is saying not english accent we were tired it was quite late we just wanted to get the card keys and go to room but he kept talking for ages but i must say i had totally perfect stay   clean cozy good sized room with comfy bed we enjoyed our stay a lot

We were there just for a night Because i mentioned while booking that it was our anniversary night they upgraded my room and also did some minor arrangements to make our day special Really appreciate that

Not a complaint because they could not have know but the kettle was faulty it was turned off but was turned on all night could have been nasty if it had caught fire   Very clean room well presented beds were very comfy excellent experience

There was a very loud noise coming from the vent every night it was hard to sleep would be perfect if that was sorted Also fire alarm kept going off which was annoying

Cannot think of anything  In 40 years of staying in London mainly for business reason the is the BEST London hotel I have ever stayed in Especially liked the touch of complementary toiletries if one had forgot them i e tooth brush
parking is an issue it was a concern when we left the car in a side street which l moved later that night   a very large bed and very good service breakfast was very good l would recommend

They had overbooked for our first night of two and thus sent us to a Holiday Inn Express down the road which was in stark contrast to what I paid for and then brought us back the next day I am still trying to get a partial refund for this lack of service I paid for and will update this if they do convene   All the staff were very friendly and the hotel has any nice amenities

Receptionist had to sort out a double room although already booked previously Then had two single beds pushed together air con wasn t working correctly wouldn t warm the room up No instructions on how to use electrical products within room Only one lift working Signal reception for television was very poor   Shower was nice

For the price and location it was relatively good but the breakfast was a major disappointment I usually prioritise that over any other facility I wish Booking com would include a breakfast rating by which to filter hotels too The breakfast was quite basic Two juice options and neither was fresh One type of eggs fried along with the other standard breakfast options tea coffee baked beans hash brown sausages and a poor selection of processed cheese   The staff at the hotel were very friendly and accommodating I arrived very early for check in and was in a hurry to drop off my luggage to join a workshop The staff at the reception made it a quick 3 minute process

Unfortunately once we checked in and went to our room we found that our key was faulty Other guests had complained of this while we were in the lobby Altogether it took only 30 40 minutes to resolve but it doesn t make a good first impression London is hot during the summer so the room was humid and stuffy We put the air con on and opened the window only to discover the windows either aren t designed to be opened or quite old and falling apart The latch wouldn t keep the window up and it was too heavy to close ourselves It s disappointing that such a lovely hotel haven t updated their windows   The location of the hotel is fantastic just one tube stop away from Victoria Station aim for Green Park Check in and check out was quick staff were very friendly and helpful the decor of the lobby and bar is stylish The room itself was comfortable with plenty of space a good bathroom with shower and bath tub The room is completely spotless and housekeeping staff are very polite The main selling point of the hotel is the fantastic location Mayfair is discreet and quiet you can easily walk around and relax perfect for a weekend away with someone close If you acknowledge the bad parts as just one of those things and instead focus on the beautiful surroundings then you ll be very happy with the hotel

Me and my girlfriend had booked a night at the hotel from the 24th to the 25th of June On arrival just like every other hotel I have stayed at we paid for the room and they add the deposit charge which we were told the deposit is just a holding charge and will refunded back This is completely normal just like every other hotel I have stayed in We were kindly upgraded FOC to a master sweet which of course we were very grateful for On departure the following day they requested a second payment for the cost of the room After explaining to the clueless front desk several times I had paid for the room on arrival they were still adamant we need to make a second payment and that the cost of the room and the deposit are just holding charges Never heard of this before and nor does it make sense seeing as they have taken the money already on the first day just to refund it back And then pay again Great logic there Unfortunately I did not have a receipt as we were not provided with one I should have requested one but I did not assume I would need to prove my innocence to them that I have paid already as it would show on their system which they checked and apparently no payment was showing Annoyingly Barclays Bank were undergoing some maintenance so I had no way of accessing my accounts via app or online to show the payment I had made on the 24th The staff were very patronising and made me and my girlfriend feel cheap as if we were trying to get away with not paying In the end we had to pay AGAIN as we were holding up their que as I couldn t access my bank to transfer further funds to my account so my girlfriend had to make the second payment This was meant to be a treat for her from myself following a promotion at her work I ve never felt so embarrassed I left feeling very bitter and robbed   Nothing really

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I didn t have any issues  We liked the location of the hotel food was good and staff very helpful We went to a concert at the o2 which was very easy and quick to get to from the hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Beautiful room looking directly over the Thames and o2 Big bed very modern throughout and a huge bath looking over the Thames too Great breakfast in very nice terrace room Very helpful friendly staff Valet parking excellent too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: There was nothing we could fault during our short stay Would stay there again when in that area and happy to recommend it   The entrance and approach is very welcoming Spotless nice fresh airey feeling and nice smells Staff very pleasant on checking in and during our stay The room and bathroom were spotless and the facilities in the room more than adequate could not fault it The outside area is pleasant with views of the Thames

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast dining room staff not at all attentive All the other staff more than compensated for this though  Lovely airy room extremely comfortable interesting views ideal for Canary Warf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: See above  Fabulous hotel staff brilliant very pro active and would go the extra mile to make our experience a lovely weekend Richard was fantastic and very knowledgeable about the local area and the transport He even supported us with transportation from the hotel to Kings across to save us having to carry a case on the underground Only one minor issue the evening meal menu was limited only one vegetarian hot meal on offer which then meant having to find alternative restaurant for the second night

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The windows were filthy that looked out to an office block and not as portrayed on the website In addition the carpet was stained and had evidence of the previous guests as there were food crumbs by the side board on the carpet   A great nights sleep on a huge comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only one point to make and that was the free shuttle At certain times we were in the allocated slots but were told by the driver it would cost us 8 to get back to the hotel  Very friendly staff Bed very comfortable No noise Breakfast probably not worth 30 for 2 people but it is London I suppose when we needed to know something or needed help a text was all it took and a very quick reply too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The complimentary jiggers of milk tasted disgusting we couldn t have tea or coffee a matter of personal taste not something that can be deemed as wrong Whilst breakfast was really good value for money it wasn t very hot My pet hate is lukewarm food But that was the only issue I had that I felt could have been better   Our room was in Pristine condition as if we were the first occupants All the little frills were present and we couldn t have asked for a more comfortable bed The staff were extremely helpful professional smart and unobtrusive yet attentive

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I can t fault it  We stay for one night for show at o2 and the whole weekend was very good staff and hotel was very helpful a great stay will stay agin for sure

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Far from nearest tube   Complimentary upgrade upon arrival Madalena s warm welcoming Great bathroom with both a bath and a powerful shower nice toiletries Comfy bed spacious room really clean

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Hotel is quite isolated from everywhere closest food other than the hotel restaurant was too far to walk Nearest train station is 18 minutes walk away Asked hotel to call a taxi and they called a chauffeur which was unnecessary and cost us 16 pound for a 5 minute journey We were also very disappointed to be woken up at around 7 30am the next day to construction work right outside our hotel door There was a lot of incredibly loud banging as well as drilling into the hotel wall I called reception to ask them what was going on but they had no knowledge About half an hour later we heard someone come up from reception to ask them to stop until our room had been vacated but by that time my three year old son had been woken up by the noise Not sure what happened there in terms of hotel organisation but it s not suitable for a hotel to conduct maintenance at 7 30 in the morning Hotel staff were apologetic and I think a little embarrassed that it had happened but no real compensation was offered It really affected the rest of our day as we were all tired and very grumpy especially the three year old Pretty disappointed   Hotel was very luxurious but what would expected for the room rate Restaurant and room service food was above average

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No complaints  On arrival to the hotel the staff were so welcoming we we re offered refreshing water whilst we checked in and also there was a sweetie cart to help yourself The room was really nice an ice machine just along the corridor which was a very nice touch All facilities you needed were available in the room even an ice bucket The hotel offered a shuttle service to Canary Wharf Tube which we used very useful Breakfast was really lovely and available till 10 30am

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast was the nicest we ve had at a hotel everything was beautifully designed and staff made us feel welcome Romantic room with cake and rose petals was a lovely touch for our anniversary

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Staff member found out it was my wife s birthday and kindly gave a free breakfast but they tried to charge us They also tried to charge for a mini bar item we didn t use Small print also charges a charity donation we do enough for charity seperately and feel this was naughty   Extremely comfy room Friendly colleagues Good transport links Good views of Thames

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Attitudes of staff at breakfast differed too much from friendly to downright rude Cooked food at breakfast either undercooked or overcooked  Beds comfy Bedding good quality Bathroom excellent

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The wifi did not connect well at all the floor in the room was wet and the shower along with the toilet was not clean  The location and view was amazing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Rooms were a little small view from our room wasn t amazing   Pillows were really comfy Sleek look to the rooms and reception Good location with a nice view from outside and the restaurant

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Make sure you ask for a river view room otherwise you may have the bins and back of other buildings as your view from the window   We stayed here as part of my girlfriend s birthday and you notice how beautiful the hotel is as soon as you walk in We mentioned in passing to the staff that it was my girlfriend s birthday and as we came back later that day to the room the staff had left a birthday card and cake with a happy birthday message written in chocolate sauce on the plate which was a great surprise The rooms are veey spacious with a big bathroom and an incredibly comfortable bed We also used the spa facilities and we had a massage which was amazing and they really made every effort to go the extra mile The breakfast views are incredible and the food was even better Throughout our stay the staff were amazing and accommodating and I couldn t recommend this hotel any more

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bathroom was lovely Staff were friendly Nothing was too much they were happy to go above and beyond to ensure my stay was enjoyable I would definitely be coming back to this hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The service at lunch was slow and they kept bringing us the wrong orders that were for other tables That could have been better but the food was good and the staff were friendly Would definitely stay again  Ideal location from East India station with a quick walk literally turn right coming out of the station and follow the road around left keeping left almost in a circle Staff were really friendly The hotel was very clean The room was really comfortable and we had prompt room service after coming back late and feeling hungry

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Lack of bar snacks behind the bar Gotbacksfter 23 00 so could not get anything to eat with a beer  Online check in and check out free shuttle back to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The reception staff were incredibly rude and unhelpful to all 11 of my guests Having worked on behalf of Radisson in the past I found this quite embarrassing No one greeted us on arrival or helped us with bags and wedding bits The check in systems also took ages with all desk staff finding it confusing no smiles no customer charm and no offer to assist with anything other than complicated check in systems The facilities were fantastic but the staff made what was meant to be a very special time for me wedding time quite stressful and I dreaded having to deal with them   Facilities and room cleanliness

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   Very accommodating knowledgeable friendly staff Very comfortable room with noticeable effort towards comfort and convenience I would definitely stay here again and will be sure to recommend this accommodation to friends and family

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Its espensive for where it is Difficult to find several of party and Uber drove inadvertently thru Black wall Tunnel adding 30 mins to journey time   Front of house staff efficient but you need to work them hard

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing 10 10   We were here to watch the Depeche Mode concert at London Stadium which is a ten minute cab ride away We got an upgrade to the penthouse suite and spent Saturday afternoon slurping chilled veuve clicquot on the outside terrace sat by the Thames on a beautiful sunny afternoon we loved this hotel cant fault anything Sage the young man behind reception was extremely helpful and went out of his way to accommodate us

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The breakfast was the best breakfast we have ever had at a hotel Great selection of food and juices Really delicious And an excellent view of the O2 from the terrace Rooms were spacious really comfy Really clean The staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff were very friendly and polite excellent service Breakfast was plentiful with a variety of options Room was very clean and cosy Really enjoyed our staff and will return again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We had booked a twin room but were told on arrival this was not available however they kindly upgraded us in apology   Very lovely accommodation helpful staff and a wonderful breakfast with views of the Thames

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Sofa bed was broken Bose speaker not working shower Gel dispenser broken laundry services unable to turn around laundry in 1 hour  Good breakfast clean friendly staff very handy for the O2 arena

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I booked the room last October as a twin room but on arrival were given a king double bed which was unsuitable as I was sharing a room with my daughter We were offered an upgrade initially at 80 which we thought too much but the priced was reduced to 40 We accepted this but I would have appreciated not having to pay for an upgrade given that I had booked so far ahead   Fabulous pillows goose down like nothing I ve ever slept with before Spectacular bathroom with tv thats a first for me Great breakfast too in lovely dining room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The only thing that let it down for me was the location otherwise it was excellent   The room was immaculate bed very comfortable loved the waterfall shower and showergel smelled lovely

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Can t fault the hotel staff facilities food and room were all fantastic Came for our anniversary and the view of the o2 from the bathroom and bedroom Made it perfect

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Our stay wasn t long enough it s such an amazing hotel   Great staff delicious food facility top notch room was amazing Couldn t ask for a better stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing negative about the hotel at all Just be aware it s not as close to the O2 as Google maps would have you believe It s an hour to walk or a 20 taxi ride   Lovely well appointed room Clean comfortable Excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Could not get a special room without cost of a suite to get a river view for my wife s 60th as I has asked for if possible via Booking com Valet parking a tad expensive on top of a high ish room rate   Clean lines The receptionist who organised a little 60th token for my wife and tried her best to accommodate a river view room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I ordered twin beds which was missed but this was soon rectified with an upgrade   Couldn t fault anything the staff were exceptionally friendly the breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff at reception was polite but very reserved An occasional smile would have been nice Apart from the view the area where the hotel us based has a bit of an industrial feel to it   Brilliant hotel Room facilities and dinner were great

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I got into a bit of a muddle regarding a complementary 15 I could use with the room I didn t have the opportunity to redeem it until the next morning when I was checking out All I asked for were a couple of coffees I confirmed with the check out staff who said it was still OK to redeem but the bar staff making the coffee said it wasn t and wanted to charge me 8 40 for 2 coffees Conversations went back and forth between bar and check in staff and confusion reigned for 15 minutes I ended up signing a bar bill still not sure whether or not that will end up appearing on my credit card after all that crazy simplify please   The size and comfort of the room Had a great night s sleep quiet and cosy Didn t want to leave the room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not being able to make a payment for the room over the phone as I booked the room for my son to get him off the streets during the recent terror attacks but there was no way for me to pay for it remotely this is really poor   Rooms were clean and the staff friendly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bathroom amenities weren t working properly as the shower bath gel container next to the bath was not checked properly and was broken walking to the shower to use that bath gel every time we used the bath was a pain Also beware of the motorway as it so loud during the day and night so light sleepers might ask to move before you get the room   Wonderful staff very pleasant and welcoming Cute candy bar

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not much to improve Children would have liked a pool though and hot chocolate in the bedroom   Really helpful staff at check in Amazing room booked a suite as stayed with family of four Plenty of room and comfy sofa bed Quiet too Delicious breakfast and they cooked veggie sausages for us especially Will book again next time we visit O2 Arena

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The robes were very hard and rough like it hadn t been washed in a good detergent The price of breakfast isn t realistic as it s 20 if you book online and if you want to pay when you get there it s 15 Overpriced for breakfast and not worth it   Very comfortable bed Lovely powerful shower

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The view on the terrace for breakfast was excellent also really good choice for everyone I m vegetarian and my partner is a carnivore there was also lots of choice for a vegan diet too Lovely The staff were very helpful and arranged a taxi to the O2 when we were rushed for time Perfect room just lovely

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The only pain was getting there from the station You can see the hotel but have to walk a fair way  Great price for a long weekend with a view of the Thames and the Dome

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The only problem was that it was an extremely hot evening and there was an ice dispenser which did not dispense any ice This is more an observation than a didn t like as there are very few places that offer that facility   All the staff at the Radisson Blu are warm friendly We were upgraded which was wonderful The room had a view of the Thames and the bed was extremely comfortable We loved that there are voiles and curtains at the windows for privacy and to block out the light The room had a separate shower and a bath which you don t always get It is the perfect stay for visiting the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Good for concerts at the 02 Arena If like me you travel around London on foot the Hotel is only a ten minute walk from East India Dock DLR station Getting to the O2 Arena from there is easy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff were really nice and looked after you The spa facilities were excellent The hotel was very clean The bed was very comfortable and the bathroom and view was amazing from the river view room we would definitely return to this hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Location of hotel was hard to find from the station its a long walk could maybe help with signposts Little space for car parking near hotel very congestive would be nice to have some parking facilities also the shower in our room was very difficult to operate could improve on this   Excellant breakfast choice and staff customer service very good good size room and very comfy and quiet Excellent staff were very helpful friendly A very lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: There was no pool or was undergoing work my little girl was very upset Also was taking her to the sauna jacuzzi etc but my little girl wasn t allowed they said cause she s under 16 but I was with her I then asked if she could hv her nails painted cause of the let down with pool and sauna etc but they said again no as she was under 16 I was very annoyed as she wasn t allowed to get nothing I thought ouldnt say it was family friendly cause of this   The rooms were excellent and very clean Staff were lovely very friendly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: At check in we were offered an upgrade and the member of staff made it sound like we were getting a lovely room as there had been a cancellation Eventually she told us it would be an extra 70 for the pleasure no thanks Along the way it seemed as though we constantly been asked for our card details or upsold something Being asked to spend extra money all the time really left a bad taste and ruined the experience for us At check out we were told we had taken 2 items from the mini bar and were charged for that I nearly lost it as that wasn t true After everything it was the icing on the cake They did realise it was a mistake and corrected it   Everything looked brand new and very clean Breakfast was lovely and a good selection Very nice coffee

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Greeting could be better and more welcoming Not really kid friendly and no kids drink choice in room Rooms were nothing special for the cost and score   The hotel looks stunning at the entrance but that s it every thing else is average Breakfast is lovely and view

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Loved everything It was just great  Everything was absolutely stunning Great service staff were great hotel was designed really well food was good You guys have got a good thing going over there and I would definitely comeback and also recommend

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: You can t actually walk directly to the O2 despite it being a few hundred meters away as the crow flies Taking a taxi is an option around 15 minutes and 10 The Hotel has good public transport links   Very clean and efficient hotel Nice sweets in the lobby area

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Opportunity to choose seat at breakfast   Exceptional service from all members of staff in the team at this branch of Radisson Blu Hotels The meet and greet was exceptional all little additional requests completed brilliantly and made the stay that little bit more special

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The night manager said he couldn t find the booking and then took a payment of 120 which the receptionist kindly refunded the overpayment of the following day   The bed was extra comfy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I was mis informed in regards to my breakfast I paid 40 extra for breakfast upon arriving and two mornings when I tried to order my breakfast I was told it wasn t paid for on my room The first morning I was sent complimentary champagne as an apology and the second morning they sent the breakfast and tried to charge upon checkout the issue was resolved but they need to make it clearer to guest what they are paying for to avoid confusion and irate customers other than that the hotel was perfect It s missing a sauna and or jacuzzi  The hotel was wonderful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Unfortunately the view from our window was of the office block opposite about 40ft away  Surperb breakfast and very comfy bed Staff very helpful and polite

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Good spacious suite and bathroom facilities Scoff Banter bar restaurant had great views and provided a relaxed dining atmosphere Hotel staff were very courteous

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We made our booking including breakfast and when we arrived they informed us breakfast wasn t included in our breakfast and they wern t willing to contact booking com to rectify my booking  The bed and pillows were so comfy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We didn t have any issues  We were given a complimentary upgrade upon arrival As we were celebrating our anniversary the room was decorated and staff had also sent cake to the room The room was very big and spacious The bathroom was very modern with a large bath and shower Food from the hotels restaurant was very good Location is also perfect very helpful with the shuttle service where you can go to Canary Wharf full of shops and restaurants Hotel itself is very beautiful with great spa facilities we booked a couples massage which was very relaxing The view from the restaurant is lovely perfect for a relaxing evening with a bottle of wine Very good for it s price Definitely will return

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I wasn t a massive fan of the bathroom layout as where one of the walls of the shower should have been the bath was there instead Also the wardrobe was located inside the bathroom which I found strange Also it s definitely not as close to the O2 as the pictures suggest A 10 taxi ride or a 70 minute walk   The design of the hotel itself was great The TV facilities were good too with catch up TV apps provided The shower itself was amazing with nice toiletries provided

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Able to check in online and the room was ready when we arrived at 10am We were greeted with towels on the bed in the shape of swans and rose petals and a dessert with Happy Birthday written in chocolate and a birthday card personalised to me Lovely surprise

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The attitude of the women from behind the bar was the ONLY bad thing about my stay at this hotel   I felt like royalty with the standard that this hotel holds itself at Everything about this hotel screams class even the lift to my room was the fanciest elevator I ve ever been in The best thing about the hotel outside of my room was the view from the bar

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Distance to any tube requires a taxi  The river views are great especially out of the bathroom whilst you bathe also seeing the o2 arena and Emirates sky ride lite up at night is amazing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing everything was perfect   The hotel managed the impossible brilliantly friendly staff whilst still being incredibly efficient I have stayed in many great hotels throughout the world but this is without doubt in my top three

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Unfortunately the shower would not work on my final morning The lever which turns on the water would not move I couldn t understand the TV control what the guide said was on was not what was actually showing   The pillows were great The quilt was heavy and I would wake up overheated Otherwise the room was very well equipped and comfortable Wonderful view of the O2 across the river especially at night

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I always enjoy my stay at this hotel the staff are friendly and professional they are also very welcoming and cater to all needs The hotel is in a private and quiet location making my stay very peaceful it is easy to get to on both public transport or taxi The rooms are very spacious and comfortable with both a bath and standing shower in the bathroom It is the perfect hotel for both business and leisure trips

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Restaurant services We went to Scoff Banter at 10 10pm to see if we could get anything to eat but sadly they didn t accommodate us as the kitchen was closed and I didn t quite understand why they were shut 20 minutes before the usual closing time 10 30pm   We stayed in a river view room It was very spacious and the view was stunning All staff were very friendly and helpful One thing I found very useful was the virtual assistant contact Edward The Chatbot for any kind of service you need Just send a text and it will all be taken care for you

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The virtual concierge Edward is a good feature but didn t deliver the extra milk we requested we received a reply to our message immediately but the milk never arrived The excellent real staff far outperformed the virtual   Without exception every member of staff offered outstanding service with a friendly courteous and efficient manner genuinely excellent customer care An immaculate modern hotel with large comfortable rooms and good bathrooms

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel damaged my personal property and is taking a very slow and convoluted process to fix it I expect a better service from a Radisson Blu hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I don t really have any negatives apart from the fact I was surprised you didn t provide toothpaste   The hotel lobby was very swanky and the bed in our room was luxurious and a great size I liked that you had iplayer and youtube so we could watch episodes etc on there The bathroom was immaculate in terms of cleanliness great sized bath and I like the open shower vibe

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Loved my stay here Was running the London Marathon and its such a central location Booked here for next years marathon too and recommended and booked for a friend too Outstanding

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The taxi company who you called said they would collect us from the O2 and when we called them they said they were too busy so two ladies on their own had to find out how to get back to the Hotel   The comfortable feeling of the facilities

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I feel misled about the price that booking com advertised I believed that breakfast was included when it was not I had had the opportunity to book the hotel at a lower rate had it have been clearer I am unlikely to use booking com again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I booked it due to the advertised proximity to the 02 except we didn t have a boat Great view of the O2 from across the water however in a cab across land it is quite a difference Staff were friendly but we tried to use the app to book a cab Total fail

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The meals we had were very good but the food was not as hot as it should have been in fact it soon went cold The tea was not to hot either  The bed was very comfortable and the room was very well cleaned The staff were all very friendly and nothing was to much trouble

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Arrival wasn t a good start We couldn t park parking is a massive issue around this hotel and needs addressing its not something you should have to tackle as soon as you entre the hotels grounds we were at check in when the lady serving us basically called us liars when we said that we had already paid for our breakfasts when booking our room that was rude enough but when she noticed that my surname was completely random on your data base and didn t change it I found that real poor customer service 3 times during our that half an hour of trying to sort out the breakfast mishap still my name is Mrs Amp I then receive a letter in our room with Mrs Amp written on the envelope seriously the letter saying that they looked at their records and we hadn t paid for breakfast and as a good will they will include our breakfast for the duration of the weekend did they not think it may of been a Booking com error again making it out as we were liars This stay was part of mine and my Husband s 1st wedding anniversary this was not going well where our room was concerned RANDOM why would you have a open wardrobe in the bathroom my husband was in using the toilet facilities while I was waiting to get my clothes strange setting the bed was comfortable but the pillow was a waste of time nice a fluffy until you put your head on it then it disappeared spent the next day with a bad back no coffee machine its 2017 who and where doesn t have a coffee machine anyway didn t spend anytime in then hotel other then breakfast and sleeping on departure we weren t even asked how our stay was the guy said very little and just took our receipt for our car key and that was that didn t enjoy our stay in your hotel and wouldn t recommend Before I post this on trip advisor ill give them a chance to redeem themselves should they see fit   The bed was comfortable decorated lovely for our anniversary with complementary cupcakes thank you

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Very busy at breakfast queue at breakfast and tables not cleared fast enough  The croissants and breakfast selection The bathroom in our room cleanliness of the hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Rooms a little bit hot no info on how to control the heating Had to change from room 527 bad drain smell in the bathroom staff helpfull with the move  Everything food was good staff were Excellant Special shout out to Richard Robson Head of Concierge heck of a nice guy and very very helpfull

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I don t really eat cured meats or cereal so all I could eat was a roll with cheese Maybe some fresh pastries from local bakery would be better  The breakfast is ok but not much choice Some poached eggs would be nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Decor dated and to dark   The room was fairly nice The only thing that let it down what the decor Found it to be dated in colour hard looking and dark My partner upgraded our room to a suite as our room we were allocated didn t have a nice view and very small for the price we paid and that s was a cheap rate

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: n a  We stayed to visit the O2 and it was our wedding anniversary We had lovely cakes left in our room with Happy Anniversary card from the hotel which was a lovely touch THANK YOU We had breakfast in the conservatory overlooking the Thames which was lovely in the sun shine

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Dissappointed with check in I was charged the full room rate 199 as the male receptionist did not notice any different from my booking booking com price was 169 I was given no details about the time of breakfast or where it was and he gave us no directions of where to find the lifts or that we needed to use the room key to operate them We had parked our car almost right outside as we managed to get a space and we were quite happy to leave it there so I asked him if it was ok to park outside and he said parking is 18 even thoughBooking com says 14 and so I paid and he gave me an envelope and a receipt so the car could have valet parking which I was not interested in especially after having to pay 30 extra on the price of the room I half listened into the conversation of the people checking into next to me and they were dealt with much differently with more information Maybe the gentlemen that served me was new I mentioned it when I checked out the next day and the lady refunded the 30 for me Still a little annoyed about the unnecessary valet parking another unnecessary expense but hey ho   Hotel was modern and quite nice Staff were professional and polite Doorman was fab Breakfast was delicious They organised some toothpaste for our room and arranged a cab for us to the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Room view was of a multistorey carpark office building opposite lacking a swimming pool which you would expect of a hotel of this type we knew beforehand of course but its just surprising especially where there is a spa Staff seemed a bit non plussed just got handed an envelope with key card in it no mention of where or when breakfast was or any other ancilliary info Location is bit off the beaten track it seems be located in a semi gated community where cars are given prio over pedestrians for pavement space   Comfortable rooms and spacious suite Tasty breakfast a little limited in choice in some areas but no real complaints Nice view overlooking O2 from the restaurant Quiet no noise disruptions Fresh fruit and water on arrival

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Room view however I m looking forward to returning to get a better room   Layla in charge of guest relations made my stay worthwhile I came to relax an evening prior to starting work and was disappointed when I didn t get a room with the view I expected for a deluxe river view room and she made things better by promising my next stay would be better and giving complimentary breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The restaurant menu does not reflect the ambience the menu is poor and not enough variety and expensive for the quality of food served Bar area though was very good   Lovely hotel well placed away from central London but close enough to activities and transport

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff were awful in checking us out and getting our car to us We were told to wait 15 minutes even though out car was parked where we left it the prior night The staff member made us wait at our car a further 20minutes even though he had our car keys in his hand Really ruined he whole experience  The gentleman who checked us in was lovely and welcoming

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing really except my car looked scruffy alongside the Ferrari s and RR s   Huge bed I needed a search dog to find my wife Really comfy Very quiet in our room a very large bathroom with shower and bath bidet Fridge even an ice bucket and ice machine in the corridor All of the staff were happy friendly and helpful Well done to the management for motivating training them so well

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: They went above and beyond to make our stay comfortable and run smoothly Really enjoyed ourselves and coming back again Love this chain of hotels and would recommend for anniversaries and nights out up London due to the links to the DLR and Jubilee Thank you

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Clean efficient hotel close to the O2 was the reason we picked the hotel Only criticism I can give would be the chauffeur service would of been great if it actually took you to the o2 rather than the tube station the bathroom was clean shower was excellent Hotel receptionist was great with advice on the area and was welcoming on check out all in all good hotel clean and comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We were going to the o2 stated 5 miles away but didn t state it s across the Thames so unable to walk Needed a cab then tube  Great choice for breakfast loved the fresh juices

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Disappointed the restaurant does not serve sandwiches at lunch time   Room was clean Bed comfy Staff were polite helpful Enjoyed breakfast but could have been hotter Nice terrace

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: There is nothing I could say that would better my stay in the radisson blu hotel it was truly an amazing stay and experience  The bed was extra comfy the bathroom amenities were excellent the room was very spacious and felt at home I m originally from London but he hotels location is perfect for someone who is not from the area it is in a secluded area away from traffic and the busy city but is easy to locate and travel to anywhere the staff were amazing and very helpful and the fact that the whole West Ham team were staying there was a bonus and the staff did there best to help me get my birthday dream of meeting them overall my stay was amazing and will definitely be planning my next trip very very soon

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: On arrival booking lost so booked again On return to hotel found booking lost again Then double room provided instead of twin Disappointing   Comfy clean room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Just that the website promoted a pool and they actually didn t have one I was looking forward to it but the spa they had was pleasant enough to still really enjoy our weekend break   The staff was very friendly and welcoming asked regularly if we needed anything and if everything was alright

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything facilities staff were fab bed was very comfortable views of Thames while eating breakfast which had so much choice All just lovely

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I did not like having to leave after 2 days but worth every moment spent there   This hotel has been our favourite for many years We enjoyed our stay as the staff were very friendly helpful and humurous at reception The room was perfect in every way great layout and bathroom

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The bathroom was gorgeous Soaked in the tub every night had a separate shower Hotel is decorated with beautiful artwork and sculptures Staff was very friendly and accommodating Free breakfast was wonderful Couldn t ask for more Absolutely loved it

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Most rooms either face a large floor to ceiling windowed office block or a residential apartment block Only a couple of rooms face the Thames and O2 Breakfast area very untidy uncleared tables despite large number of staff I appreciate it is busy on a Sunday morning but staff are way too slow clearing resetting tables   Very professional and attentive reception area staff Modern and stylist throughout Large comfortable rooms and beds quality linen Lovely conservatory overlooking Thames

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: the veiw out of the window facing offices   The breakfast view was lively the staff were wonderful we really enjoyed our stay and would recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bit of an embarrassing language issue ordering dinner one evening Other staff member stepped in and resolved Beautiful place and great people be prepared to pay for it though Location is lovely although there are no shops or bars nearby   Rooms really comfortable well equipped and clean Staff really helpful and view amazing Location convenient for the purpose of my visit Blackwall DLR is reasonably close by

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Prices are a little steep and we were promised last year that you would have the boat running over to the 02 not your fault but thought it worth a mention

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Had some issue with noise from works department but the desk manager Eric was excellent in his response to our comments Would not hesitate to stay again   Staff very welcoming Free shuttle service to Canary Wharf excellent breakfast with very good variety Great cocktail menu and well stocked bar Housekeeping excellent

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The reason for our 3 night stay was to attend the Country 2 Country festival at the 02 It wasn t clear when we booked that the 02 was a cab ride away However the hotel staff kindly helped us rectify this   We cannot fault the kindness and obliging manner of the staff The breakfast was amazing Probably the best omelette I ve ever had The beds were comfy The shower was good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing to fault at all but it s further from the tube station than it looks on the map   Staff were excellent even before arrival they helped with how to check in They were all friendly and helpful Great location for the O2 and probably for other things in the area too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Could have done with a footbridge over the river to the O2   The bed was unbelievably comfortable Breakfast was delicious Great view over the river especially in the early morning light

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The fact we had to complain waited for half hour to sort it to get the rooms we asked for and paid for originally as put on different floor to our daughters The price of the breakfast 20 4 for both days we didn t have in the end although did hear other guests offered it for 15 each the cost of parking but then it is London We were offered a room upgrade due to cost of breakfast but would have had to pay 40 per room per night so that worked out the same as the breakfast what was the point there Don t think we will be staying there again will go to Premier Inn or Travellodge where we can get breakfast included and free parking   The music in the lift the tv Reception staff were friendly even after a few problems we had The parking was weird as we just abandoned the car and then next day it was parked elsewhere or at the front door

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I looked for a hotel with parking and was shocked to be told I had to pay 18 for parking after I arrived also I was told by booking com breakfast was included when it wasn t and got an additional charge of 40 for breakfast for 2 this I believe was false advertising by booking com Very unhappy with booking com as what was advertised as a room for 187 turned into 1night 400 I would suggest people do not use your services as they are not accurate No fault of the hotel itself

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast service was very poor no food prepared had to wait for food and drinks it was exceptionally busy and staff just could not cater for so many people at once but worth the wait the food was excellent and all staff   Bed was very comfortable The Lovely Lady who checked us in made us most welcome and did everything she possibly could to make our stay most pleasurable All hotel staff were very polite and could not do enough to help us Fantastic stay overall

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: for the price we payed for the room was not wort it No biscuits with the cofee in the morning left in the room Milk was minum hustled by the taxi driver Was not aware there was no frer parking so cost us another 18 for the car to be parked Will definately not be staying there again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It was a pain to get back to the hotel after our event at the O2 which isn t the hotels fault no complaints really would recommend and would definitely stay again  Staff were brilliant very welcoming rooms and food were spot on

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I just wished I stayed longer   From booking to checking out is always a great experience The staff really catered to my needs and requests When I arrived I was greeted by jonathan who checked me in He was funny adorable tentative and professional My room is the same I get every time but due to a special occasion the staff placed me on a higher floor over looking the o2 I had their signature towel swans with rose petals and a lovely card with a beautiful cake slice Walking through the hotel staff are so nice greeting us and just being very helpful The Deluxe king room with river view has the softest bed I m sure the whole hotel does The bathtub with glass view of the o2 and walk in shower is just the best with the big overhead shower head Having breakfast was such a highlight of the morning The buffet is hot tasty and such a variety I loved the cucumber juice Stefan is always a delight to see He is so welcoming and remembered me from my previous stay He greats all guests with warmth and just that little extra something Thank you stefan Checking out we had the lovely jonathan again and he made us laugh and made sure we enjoyed our stay Him and my partner talked about the gym and working out Thank you again jonathan The location of this beautiful hotel is the best from being right by the water and great night time views to restaurants and local amenities I wish I stayed more than 1 night for the staff the hotel is an a plus Clairece Marshall Room 628 March 3rd

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Reception upgraded our room which was great We went for my boyfriends birthday and the staff had put a birthday card and little cake in the room along with rose petals on the bed which was a great surprise The staff were very attentive and couldn t do enough for us The breakfast was lovely and the views of the river and o2 were great would recommend having breakfast on the terrace Would definitely recommend staying there and we will be going back again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The sink in the bathroom was not draining properly I asked someone to come and look and nobody came besides being promised it will be looked at   The room was spacious though the outside scenery was not great Loved having the Spa at the hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: More vegetarian vegan gluten free options please Also my husbands chicken Kiev was swimming with oil and my chicken and avocado salad was nothing but fatty chicken and smothered with vinegar Please improve   Bathroom bed view staff was lovely Location was great

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No tea or coffee in the room Breakfast didn t have asmuch variety as double tree Hilton  The staff and the view The room was beautiful The water in the bedroom and the bathroom was amazing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Thought it was closer to 02 had to get taxi there and back and that cose 18 pound there and 25 pound back   Everthing about the hotel thankyou so much

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only one place to have coffee Despite being a Monday and almost empty was told the sunlounge empty but for one other was for the more formal tea and I only wanted a cup  The Staff esp the girl who went up and down 4xs in lift with me till was sure I could cope unfortunately couldn t give full marks as leaving check out disappointing Comfortable room and bed Breakfast gets 5 stars

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Although breakfast was great and you could eat yourself silly it was very costly at 20 a head   Loved the huge bed and the great bathroom with walkin shower Location was spot on for our needs

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: When we were checking out it took the car park staff an hour to get our car There was only one person retrieving cars until the concierge called in some extra staff to assist   Bed was very comfortable Room was also quiet other hotels are often not so good Reception staff were very helpful and friendly Liked the availability of car parking at the hotel but valet parking wasn t so efficient when we were heading home See what could have been better We stayed at the hotel because we were going to The O2 hotel is very convenient for O2 quick transport link to O2 via DLR and Jubilee Line

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Hanging area for clothes in bathroom would get damp when using bathroom No extractor fan in bathroom Some maps of how to get to Canary Wharf station and 02 would have been helpful Longer hours for Shuttle bus   Excellent breakfast with wide choice of things to eat Shuttle bus to Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The fact that the website was misleading and lead us to believe that the hotel was 5 mins away from the 02 well it was but on the other side of the Thames river we later read from previous guests comments that the hotel provided a free shuttle to the tube station but we weren t informed about this We booked a taxi to and from the 02 which cost us 18 each way breakfast 15 per person plus 18 for valet car parking it became an expensive one night stay disappointing   The room was comfortable quiet and staff attentive Breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It as slightly pricey for my likely Nevertheless it was a good stay with good service   The bed was very big and comfortable The breakfast was exquisite To die for one might say

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: view of skips and rubbish from bedroom window car parking gone up since booking and despite me having a printout I was charged the new rate Delay 15 20 mins waiting for car on collection   staff friendly and helpful cleanliness and room quality

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Just a pity there is no access to ample empty seating with a view of the Thames at window during non meal times when not being used   Great breakfast and friendly staff lovely room and bathroom

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing to say   I like to fact that everything you need is available in the room Coffee machine kettle ironing board hair dryer creams cotton buds nail file vs

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Paid 18 for car park yet my car was parked just outside entrance to hotel reception once checked out was made to wait 20 minutes for my car and was told it would be brought to us although it was parked just outside still no car after half an hour so my partner then went to ask for our keys and we moved it ourselves Not happy about that at all  Staff were all very friendly upon check in

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not much information about parking   Great views lovely staff and fantastic rooms Love everything about this hotel and would defently stay here again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Being called down to reception at midnight to pay our bill due to no one on check in taking our details Having housekeeping walk in a number of times before 11am and after 7 30pm Going for breakfast and having the plates cleared before we had finished there were no trays so if you wanted more then two items you had to go back Which we did we wanted fruit too Room service wasn t all that great kitchen apparently closes half an hour before it mentions and then the sandwiches offered on the late night menu are not worth the amount they charge you Charges added to our bill a day before we even checked in so they weren t us at all Minimal tea making facilities Only thing offered back after all the inconvenience was the two lots of the free 15 credit included in our room and a free upgrade if we ever wished to return which they managed to take from my account instead of put back   Stayed here as part of our anniversary getaway I had emailed someone a few days before we arrived to arrange something for our room Everything went to plan but quickly went wrong when we got there Overall lovely hotel with a great view from the bedroom and bathroom Great location East India is less than a 5 minute walk away and one stop from Canning Town where you can get the jubilee line Breakfast was fine as it was included wouldn t pay for it otherwise Staff were very unorganised and no one seemed to know what was going on Easy to get to Great location for O2 View from our room was as described Hotel was lovely

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The spa You can use the sauna showers and steam room complimentory of your stay When we stayed the steam room was out of order the sauna and shower area wasn t particularly well maintained and the staff were not very helpful   Every thing about the hotel except for the spa

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The healthy breakfast was amazing The staff was so friendly and went beyond expected to make sure we had a great stay The spa was amazing and their managerial skills are top of their game Everybody was so friendly can t wait to stay there again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Parking was an issue I had to pay for valet parking as I didn t get space The breakfast was a little disappointing but overall the hotel is beautiful  Loved how the staff listened and co operated and also handled our complaints promptly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not a massive point but there wasn t a great variety of juice at breakfast I had water instead   We ve stayed here a few times and I know others who have stayed here and never have a bad word to say about it The staff were very helpful and the texting service was great The breakfast was lovely

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The shower didnt drain away as fast as it came out had to use towels to dry up the extra water   Loved the friendly and helpful staff the shuttle was very handy Decor was amazing Wifi and TV channels where sufficent seperate bath and showers are always a winner

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything was fantastic  Great location comfy beds friendly staff Rainforest shower was wonderful and all toiletries were provided Staff offered to help with everything we needed Hotel is on a Pok stop

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only bad point off the stay was I had to ring down to reception just after midnight to complain about the music that was coming from the bar but the staff where very good and the duty manager phoned back to say it has now finished so not really a complaint as such   The staff where very welcoming on arrival and during our stay ordered room service just after 11pm and it arrived very fast and my wife really enjoyed it our river view room was amazing overlooking the Thames and the o2 bed was really comfy and the breakfast was amazing me my wife would definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The Spa wasn t exactly looked after the relaxation room had no hot water and the steam room wouldn t even work which was a shame Heard a few things that that the staff were new and weren t too sure what to do   The bed s were comfy and the room was lovely We didn t eat or drink there but the location is very close to the Canary Wharf centre so it is perfect location wise The spa was ok

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
