Full_Review: Nothing to improve  Bed was super super super comfy curtains blocked out all sunlight in the morning and the freshly squeezed juices for breakfast were the best I ve tasted Asked for some swans and petals to be made up to surprise my Girlfriend on arrival to the room We loved every minute and will be back again should we visit the O2 again The O2 is about 20 minutes of public transport from the O2 which is made up of a 9min walk to the DLR and then a 5 minute journey and you re at the O2 Very very easy Top tip If using the Tubes DLR use a contactless debit credit card as it ll cap the cost at about 6 60 if traveling in Zones 1 2 per day and works exactly the same as an oyster card

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I loved everything about this hotel staff were friendly the breakfast was amazing with a view while you eat I could not fault the room at all the view was amazing and the bed was extra comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel is beautiful clean and comfortable the reception bar and restaurant staff were very welcoming and intentive as they were able to help us out with everything we needed from a shuttle into town to how to get to kings cross when there is a tube strike

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Perhaps it would be an idea to sort out the temperature of the water in the shower it was slightly too cool for my preferences so I used the bath instead   The selection of freshly prepared juices for breakfast was amazing And also there was a delicious carrot cake waiting for us in the hotel room upon our arrival for my birthday it was a very lovely gesture

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The location We found it so hard to find even after getting off the DRL we could see the hotel but couldn t go round the front because it was gated up with padlocks so we had to walk all the way round the back where we just guessed our way Understandably there were roadworks going on but they need to place signs for the hotel around the area We got into the new providence wharf and it still took us 15 mins to find the hotel because there were no signs around just guessing again The scenery views were incredible though   The rooms were really clean and spacious and the beds were really comfy The staff helped us a lot with any queries we had

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Had a lovely night here the beds are to die for literally sank into them and didnt want to go home Everything there you need clean welcoming relaxing etc Lovely views No complaints Definitely coming back

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We had a lovely meal in the restaurant however I was still in the middle of eating when the serving waitress asked us to give her a personal good review She did the same spiel at the end of the meal also   From the moment we arrived to when we left the staff were so courteous and very professional Nothing was too much trouble for them and after enquiring to the purpose of our visit ensured we knew which transport links we would need Top notch Couldn t fault the stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Booked to attend the O2 bit frustrating seeing it across the river with no very near crossing Taxi was the easiest option 18 each way  We upgraded our room very nice room over looking river Large bed with lots of room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The draft lager in the bar was not the best   The rooms were excellent beds and pillows really comfy Staff were very helpful the valet parking was really handy Close to travel links Overall an excellent stay and when visiting London again will be my preferred choice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Mini bar was charged automatically so be careful We experienced a problem with it it was wrongly charging us for items we didn t really use However the beautiful lady in the reception can t remember her name unfortunately helped us to sort out this little problem Many thanks  The hotel is fantastic Very close to the train station and O2 The entrance of the hotel is fabulous with the amazing BFG sculpture The checking in was very smooth The suite we booked was very spacious clean with a modern bathroom The staff were very friendly and outstanding They were very child friendly They were always available to serve and help us They were even coming every night to check that everything is good in the room For an example if you need extra water or toiletries Breakfast was delicious with hot baked peaks scrambled eggs mashroom breads fruits and other dishes The breakfast dishes were all the same every day but still delicious My advice to you is don t miss this hotel I will definitely stay in this hotel when I come to London

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Foreign staff difficult to understand basic breakfast and location is not great for public transport  Excellent value for money but nothing extraordinary

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing to fault   Absolutely perfect This was my boyfriend and i s first time staying at a hotel and we missed it before we even left We are 100 staying there again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The breakfast was poor especially for a vegetarian Little choice of eggs and no alternative to meats Too few staff at breakfast to replenish foods and coffee Awful toaster   The room was clean and well laid out The bathroom was good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We booked for 3 nyts on the first night we had the shower leaking and flooded out the whole bathroom the plumber was called and took a while fixing the shower which made us very late going out then the cleaner come after 20minutues of waiting around Once we got back the toilet then over flooded which at this time it was very late and we wanted to sleep we spoke to reception and the gentleman told us he was going have to move us rooms We then had to pack all of our stuff and move out that room around 3am in the morning which caused alot of distress when we just wanted to relax The room was smaller than the one we already had  The day time staff were really friendly especially the young lady at reception however the night time staff on the first night were very rude especially the gentleman working on the front desk he just seemed like he didnt want be there and was fed up tbh

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The bed was still too firm despite being padded with a topper and a duvet facilities being listed on TV rather than in handy booklet form instructions for use of safe and aircon in small type and in dimly lit areas unreadable for the elderly unless armed with a light and a magnifying glass A lovely very slippery bath with soap etc anchored at the wrong end I had to use the bathroom with great caution as so many surfaces were slippery I hate showers so it is accurate to say that comfort was lacking My son complained at the time about inconsiderate parking as cars were parked in the turning circle he drove me to and from the hotel and to visit family etc   Members of staff went out of their way to provide what I needed as I am in my eighties somewhat infirm I have painful arthritis and I had a list of requirements viz a mattress topper blankets and sheets a seat in the bathroom etc all attended to by a lovely girl on reception

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Maybe a bookable minibus shuttle service to Canary Wharf tube on a daily basis at around 11 30 am when many people check out   Good service following a minor accident due to a design fault with the shower Excellent breakfast in a wonderful setting

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Great staff who went the extra mile to make our anniversary short stay one to remember Great technology Wifi and TV spa relaxation room the best and very friendly and tentative staff Sensational breakfast spread too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The scrumbled eggs were terrible No salt at the tables The spa is rather small and the  Croissants were very tasty The staff was extraordinary friendly and helpful Very nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: nothing  The room was spacious and spotless bed was very comfortable breakfast had enormous choice we really enjoyed our stay and it was perfect for going to the o2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Tea and coffee facilities in the room Not well presented actually let the room down like it was an after thought to put some packets in a tub Didn t match quality of rest of amenities should of included biscuits hot chocolate and been better presented  Comfortable bed Reception area with complimentary fruit and water Nice touch to have courtesy taxi to canary wharf Staff friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cleaner accused us of smoking in the room This was not true and once we had spoken to the manager the fine was revoked and apologies were given Be sure not to throw empty cigarette box in the bin or this may happen to you   Big comfortable bed very comfortable Lovely fruit bowl complimentary in room Breakfast was first class very tasty and good variety Sauna gym and steam room all in good order Need more therapists available as they alwaya seem to be fully booked for massages Parking should be included as its an extra 14 for the day The staff were all very friendly and overall will return again Be sure to have lunch very nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything was perfect  The view was perfect from my room the bed was extra comfy We walked into a room with a birthday card cute cakes and a birthday ballon and my boyfriend Felt loved and special as it was his birthday I loved everything we had the best weekend ever at this hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Didn t like being woken up in the middle of the night by shouting swearing and banging about which seemed to go on far to long Heard everything like it was inside our room   Excellent breakfast and v clean hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   Everything was perfect Upgraded the room and was worth the little bit extra fantastic view extremely helpful and friendly staff breakfast was fantastic including the view of the o2 the cleanliness was 100 Would definitely stay again Thank you

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bed was too firm for me Wash bowl trough is not practical for a wet shave   This is a modern contempory styled hotel which is ideally located for Canary Wharf Room was functional but make sure the curtains are closed as you are overlooked unless facing the Thames Reception were efficient and helpful Can t comment on the facilities or breakfast as we did not use

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel is in a lovely part of town surrounded by new builds The hotel it s self is stunning with beautiful interior Staff were extremely friendly and helpful We were able to park our car at the hotel for only 14 for 24 hours while we went shopping in town

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Service in the restaurant was very slow Ordered extra drinks after dinner but waited too long so cancelled before paying the bill Also the starter was cold

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not then Hotels fault but getting there was a nightmare a13 flyover closed and East London on Friday afternoon was terrible It took us 4 hours to travel 12 miles from Knightsbridge to the hotel   Convenient location for our weekend and where we wanted to go

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: A swimming pool jacuzzi  The comfy bed quality of room in general seemed good quality products Bar area view across the water Great staff too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: surrounding area and view from room 403 not as easy to get to o2 as it appeared  good breakfast selection with lots varied fruits friendly reception staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Fevertree Tonic would have been preferred in the gin   It was very good value for money the king size room was fantastic the staff very helpful The evening meal was brilliant Good Gin and Tonics

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: As a diabetic the breakfast items were limited We were not offered the menu items to choose from but encouraged to have buffet breakfast The website stated a free shuttle service was available when I asked about this service I was told it wasn t being offered The hotel is difficult to locate due to limited signage which we didn t notice until we were leaving having walked past it four times   The bed was comfortable The room was very clean and staff replenished used items while we were out of the room Receptionist provided details of a more suitable station to travel to route to West End

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The checkout staff in the morning seemed tired and miserable The taxi firm the reception recommended carrot cars left me and my family waiting in the cold outside the 02 for over an hour We booked it for 22 30pm and he hadn t arrived by 23 45pm so we managed to find another taxi firm This ruined the evening as we had to have the children in school in Norwich the following morning They were cold and tired and because of this I ll book at the Intercontinental to avoid the trip back after the gig Shame because the taxi firm you recommended has cost you future bookings  I liked our waiter when we had lunch He was 100 Food was good although the fish in my fish finger sandwich was grey instead of white Room service was prompt and the food good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was perfect   The rooms were amazing Beds were extra comfy and the location was spectacular I had booked the stay for my boyfriends birthday and the hotel couldn t have been any better They surprised him with a cake card and balloon Also we had the West Ham team staying there on the same day so was a treat getting to meet them Defo recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No pool Location away from everywhere and a bit rough  Good shower Nice spa though only 2 hours complimentary when booking a treatment and staying at the hotel seems a little mean Staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Excellent staff friendly brilliant location 10 minute walk away from Canary Wharf tube even better was a shuttle service to the tube from the hotel beds super comfy and really clean bathroom superb Amazing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Service was outstanding from reception to car valet to restaraunt all excellent The bed was the most comfy bed I have ever slept in Fabulous hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It was a very elegant environment The view was beautiful Room service was great and we were surprised at how tasty the food was The bathroom was a particular highlight as I fell in love with the overhead shower and the large tub

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Wardrobe in bathroom clothes become damp with steam Difficult for a fairly small person to use soap and shampoo from fixed container when sitting in bath Hair Conditioner only in shower not in bath Location a disappointment booked it because website claims easy access to O2 We wanted to walk there and back Very disappointed at need for public transport or taxi It is a cruel and unfair claim even taxi driver asked if we had fallen for the hoax that the hotel is near O2 his very words Also directions from east India tube station needs to state which exit and which direction to take once you re going the right way they are accurate   Comfy bed Spacious reception area Restaurant good value for two course meal Helpful reception staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The fire alarm going off at 2am It was a computer glitch so not much they could do about that The food at dinner time was expensive and small portions and that s without any veg on the side Both times we tried room service nothing happened   The breakfast The massive need The hospitality of the staff at reception

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Location a bit off the beaten track 15 minute walk to Canary wharf 8 minutes to neartest public transport Area souless   The usual high standard you expect from SAS Radison

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cleaness could be done better and food served at breakfast seemed frozen while the some staff told it was fresh The bar staff was kind of slow The water at the shower didn t drain well off   The green juice at breakfast the reception especially the lady that helped me L

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The online checkout went wrong and it took a while to sort out The hotel could not see that we had paid but it was showing straight away on our bank statement online  The size of the room The breakfast was excellent loads of choice and extra bits like smoothies The staff were lovely and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Fire alarm continued to be triggered between 00 00 through to 02 00 with no understanding as to why leaving 40 customers in the reception area clueless Staff untrained on how to deal with such issue to the point they started to show disbelief on as to why no one onsite was trained accordingly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The cushions on the bed smelt heavily of BO Due to it being noticed later at night as we didn t arrive until late it was an inappropriate time to sort When told to reception in the morning all they said is that we can have a feee upgrade next time I explained we may not be coming back so that s not a suitable outcome for us  The location

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We arrived for breakfast at 10oclock Sadly there wasn t a lot of the buffet breakfast left So next time I would like to see more being replenished   We had a suite which was fantastic for three ladies This was our second visit Defiantly returning again next year when we see Little Mix at O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Great hotel lovely views from room and in the conservatory restaurant Birthday cake for my partner was beautiful Great location for O2 and North Greenwich Free taxi shuttle to canary Wharf great

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I arrived just before midnight managed to check in over an hour after my arrival My booked room was not available Was geting a lower quality room for the price of a highter grade one had to call the manager Sink of the bathroom was blocked

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff were all helpful and friendly the breakfast choice was excellent and the room was what we wanted and expected It was ideal for the O2 with just a short ride on DLR and then a shorter ride on the underground On leaving a packed Arena we were back in the hotel room within 30 minutes

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We didn t drive but saw there was an issue with parking at the hotel Loads of cars all around the entrance  Upon arriving the staff were efficient helpful and friendly The hotel decor was very modern and stylish just right for a parents getaway from the kids

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Absolutely fantastic stay we had Would very much like to thank the the lady who checked us in especially as she helped me organise a surpirse for my partners 30th very accommodating and kind Beautiful hotel and will definitely be staying here again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It s a bit far from the citu centre but if you need to be in the area Canary Warf then this hotel is excellent When you arrive at the hotel don t expect the welcoming greet Because the bell captain is not always at his spot   The room practical amenities the staffs breakfast the view and the price is really good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing to report   The room was a lovely size with fabulous bathroom including full size toiletries Very comfy bedding and extremely clean The staff were very helpful and professional Great service Breakfast was plentiful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Extra touches such as a happy birthday card with flowers chocolate desert Not all rooms have a good view but that didn t matter too much to us   Friendly and helpful staff Stylish clean and comfortable rooms Ice machine in the corridor Parking available at a fair charge Breakfast for everyone Delicious Short cab ride to main area

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It s hard to be negative about this hotel but if I had to make a slight criticism it would be the shampoo conditioner and body wash I felt these weren t of the same standard or caliber as the rest of the hotel they were pretty sub standard in my view and dare I say slightly disappointing   Jonathan on reception was fantastic funny welcoming friendly a great welcome received by him especially Our room was lovely had a great view of the O2 Our bed was very comfortable and I loved the decor of our room the bath was very deep and relaxing in fact again it was a great room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The response of the night staff man when I reported a couple of broken glasses outside when I informed him I had picked up as much as possible To this I received no thank you and he was very rude making the asumtion it was myself that did this   The facilities and taxi service

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The fact that we had to leave   Bed was very comfy staff amazing especially at check in Cocktails are amazing and room service along with food was good too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: view from the room wasn t exciting distance from shops and restaurants  delicious breakfast shuttle to Canary Wharf but it would be helpful to be more frequent near to the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No point of room service if all they have is a ham sandwich The glasses in the room were dirty   The room was really pretty there was an ice machine in the hallway

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: After reading the reviews I was expecting something much nicer It s a contemporary hotel but nothing in the room was contemporary I mean it didn t even have a dock for music from your iphone the TV had some channels but didn t offer any movies to rent The king room was very small and so was the bathroom I felt almost claustrophobic The view from this room was down to the hotel entrance was much better than the first room I had been given when I checked in as the room was facing a block of buildings I had this swapped first The walls are thin We could hear the neighbours talking   The hotel was clean and staff were friendly bed was comfy It s an average 3

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: My breakfast could have been a little hotter I ordered eggs benedict and pancakes   I loved my room especially because it is the 3rd time I stayed there and I am grateful that they once again allowed my request for this Staff here are always helpful and friendly Service is quick too I never have a bad stay Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Quite expensive room wasn t available upon arrival approx 3pm so we had to wait more than an hour in the bar so hardly any time left for extensive sex in the luxurious room ordered taxi was given to other people so we had to wait another approx 20 minutes Good thing the hotel kind of compensates for these deficiencies   Bed nd bathroom with great view while showering bathing and or making love on Thames and O2 stadium Unfortunately there s no direct walking path or boattaxi to O2 so we had to order taxi to get to O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The bed was like sleeping on the floor It was far too hard we didn t sleep well at all No check back on food from staff plates weren t hot hence resulted in food going cold quickly Couldn t quite understand why Chips Peppercorn sauce came with Steak yet all additional side orders had to be ordered separately for the Corn Fed Chicken making it an expensive meal A porter to greet us at the door with our luggage would ve been a nice touch Never stayed at a hotel where there is a lovers kit in the fridge door lol   The Room had an exceptional view over to the O2 over the Thames All hotel areas were clean presentable the room 628 was spacious again clean Terrace looked inviting too Room was quiet too

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: To be honest there was nothing that I didn t like Everything was ok Although I spent most of my time in bed   Hotel was lovely staff were friendly and welcoming Needed this break has I have recently lost my mum and finding it pretty hard to cope Please let me know when a deal comes up so I can visit radisson blu edwardian

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The room was lovely but the bed wasn t the most comfortable It certainly wasn t uncomfortable just felt a little basic but I have stayed in other hotels in Canary Wharf same star rating and lower where the mattresses were much more comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Time it takes to walk to and from nearest Docklands Light Railway trains   Location to o2 venue Comfy luxurious stay and facilities available Good views Friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Check out could be 12 as 11 was a little early  Jonathan on reception was very helpful and the bed was great could do with being told the brand thanks ryan

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The reception staff where incredibly friendly and helpful The room was comfortable exactly to our needs We will definitely be returning to this hotel on our next trip to London

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Safe environment for female travellers good location easy access to DLR Well equipped comfortable clean rooms Complimentary water appreciated Modern bathroom v good room service options Professional staff Highly recommend

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff was amazing they couldn t do enough for you make sure you don t miss the breakfast it s soo tasty it s untrue I can t wait to come back again the riverview room is definitely worth upgrading to The room and the view were second to none Shuttle bus service was really handy although the tube is only a 10 minutes walk away anyway one evening we was going to see a show in the west end whilst waiting for a taxi in the lobby we noticed a complimentary sweet cart near reception that was a nice touch we had a little goodie bag for the show for free

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It said there was parking but we decided in end to travel by train This was good as there seemed to be extremely limited parking and would have been problem so felt wrongly described on bookings com  The staff were very good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  I really like the girl Emily on reception if she is single tell her to Facebook me Harry Matthews I would definitely come to London to date her lol loved the whole place it was beautiful thank you for a great stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Amazing stay Upon arrival I happened to mention it was my little boys birthday and soon after we arrive In our room we were send a lovely plate of cakes and a birthday card from the reception manager My boys face was a picture made his day Thank you very much for making our stay memorable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing  Staff was wonderful both Front Desk and Bar Restaurant and especially Richard Consierge Great help with trip to Scotland

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Shower was an overhead cascade only which can really annoy if you don t want to get your hair wet   View from best room terrific and the bed was the best ever slept in Very professional and elegantly presented

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The steam room was way too hot that so we couldnt go in another couple also said the same and the sauna didn t seem on at all   The rooms lovely and the beds were so comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: the air con in our room was so loud we couldn t sleep in peace at all not a pleasant experience with staff removing our luggage without notifying us while we were out and checking us in in an existing customer s room no sincere apologies from the staff who made the mistake who was present when we checked out and the staff who said would sort everything out after we return from dinner  buffet breakfast had nice options the size of our room was good nice views from the river view rooms the night shift reception manager was very helpful when he knew about the experience had everything sorted out quickly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The person on the front desk layla made the difference A very polite young lady and was very helpful Would return on the basis of how good at her job she was

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Mini fridge did not work and had a strange smell feedback given to reception  Amazing experience able to check in early lovely room massive shower the Spa was perfect lovely dinner and breakfast at the resturant on site Scoff and Banter would love to come back and stay again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Loved the room had an amazing view of the River The staff were very friendly We stayed the weekend for my husband s birthday On the first night we were surprised to see a birthday treat sent up to our room Same thing happened on the second night Room service was also great Overall I think I ll visit again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: False fire alarm went off at night for 20 minutes It was really loud in our room and caused us to wake up  High quality a lot of space very friendly staff great facilities

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Hard to find no twin room so I got a great bed and my pal got a camper bed not ideal   Lovely towels comfortable room everything to hand great location Brill break

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Privacy glass would have been better in the bathroom As you had to shut the lovely view out while in the bath Bed was too hard for us Lunch Service in the restaurant was slow   Room was lovely and the view was really good You had everything you needed in the room The hotel was very clean and staff friendly Good buffet breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I got a room for a higher price than a friend I was travelling with I therefore got a voucher for food for 15 we had diner at the restaurant together but by mistake we asked the charges to be put on my friend s room when we were checking out the next day I asked if they could transfer the diner charges to my room so I could use the voucher the reception did it withot any problem but when it came to paying they said it was not possible to use the voucher I had no time escalate this to a manager on duty so paid for the diner however I am very disappointed in the way I was treated   room was very good clean comfortable diner was also very good and the waitress was very nice with excellent customer service

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only thing i disliked was i ordered a bottle of wine to the room and it never came which was a bit disappointing  Natalya at reception was really helpful came for my boyfriends 30th birthday and he loved it the room was SO spacious the bath tub was AMAZING the bed was so big i felt like i was sleeping alone it was just overall an amazing evening the location was good we went to eat At gauchos in o2 and it was only a 6 minute cab journey

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Location It s quite far out from everything it was hard for us to find places to go eat find a shop near by However we did eat at the hotel which had really nice food We also got given 15 credit to spend in the restaurant or spa   Absolutely beautiful hotel got the room we were expecting also got our special requests Another hotel which is lovely if you re looking to relax it has a wonderful spa over looking the 02 Arena River Thames Our room was also beautiful again with amazing views across the river Had a lot of Windows which we loved The bathroom was just fabulous

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The whole room was fully equiped extra large bed and super comfortable Loved the ice bucket and drink accessories simply perfect The bathroom was absolute heaven Spacious and very clean Also the Virtual Host provided by the hotel was extremely fast and reliable all i had to do was send a text and all my needs were met right away From the minute we walked in and checked out every single staff were absolutely great Especially Flori sorry if i may have spelt her name wrong she made us feel super welcome and dealt with all our matters perfectly Its so nice to stay in a place where all the staff are this good They even provided us with a big cake and special arrangements in the room for my partners birthday We could not stop telling our friends and family how amazing our stay was Cannot wait to visit again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: That we only stayed for one night   Lovely rooms with a fantastic view I said it was my girlfriends birthday and she got a card cake and the bed was made up beautiful Breakfast was fantastic a huge selection of great tasting food

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The very false welcome from Mina the guest relations woman who really only wanted your name address date of birth telephone number and email so she could get her bonus for selling your details on Don t be taken in by its great to have you guys here Its great for her She does not need any details

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The fact that our room had been given away due to a glitch and having to move hotel close to midnight Being woken up half an hour before requested breakfast time for my friend and then having to chase mine 3x and thus not even having time to eat it   The decor

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The cost of the tube to commute into central London  Everything was perfect the restaurant was beautiful and very good value for money The interaction between the hotel via text was unique and very helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff and facilities were great To a person every member of staff could not have been more helpful during my stay It had the vibe of an independent boutique hotel with a friendly welcoming vibe but backed up with the facilities afforded in a high end chain Comfortable well appointed rooms and a great breakfast in the restaurant before I left for my meeting in the morning

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The room didn t have a great view even thou I booked in May The iron bleached a item of clothing and the cleaner came into our room twice Sunday morning well before cheak out and even thou the do not enter sign was on   The staff where great with our complaints a very helpful trainee member of staff fully credit to her

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I stayed here for 2 nights when doing Ride London There were a number of cyclists staying at the hotel and the staff were extremely helpful and friendly They allowed me to keep my bike in the bedroom and put out breakfast on Sunday from 5am instead of the normal time The breakfast was excellent and we also ate in the restaurant on Sunday evening and that was very good and not overly expensive The room was comfortable and well sound proofed The hotel was very convenient for both Excel and the Olympic Park so definitely recommended for anyone doing Ride London in the future as well as anyone wanting to stay near Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: awkward design of bathroom which included a wardrobe had to take my clothes out each time I used the bathroom a regular shower head would be beneficial too instead of a cleaning jet  silent rooms with little noise from above or next to neighbours ice facility in the hall

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only small points Details in bathroom might be better cleaned or serviced The drawer fronts were in need of cleaning and there was limescale deposits at the foot area of the shower door which should be regularly removed I think Small detail the soap dispenser near the sink was very stiff and using it caused the dispenser to come apart we had to put it back together   Efficient quiet friendly staff good room very useful indeed to be able to take the bike up to the room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We stayed here in 2015 for the same event and it was amazingly good the staff went out of their way last year to accommodate cyclists and their was a handwritten card in our room to wish us luck for the event which was such a nice touch There wasn t anything like that this time though which was a bit of a shame It was all a bit humdrum this time and it seemed like a lot of money for a fairly basic room with breakfast not included The really dark bathrooms are a bit depressing and the corridors are a bit bleak   Convenient location for the RideLondon event at the Olympic Park Lovely non alcoholic cocktails in the bar Great lobby Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I loved the friendliness of all the staff they made me and my daughter very welcome from the reception staff to the bar staff to the restaurant staff The staff were very professional and we loved out stay we will definitely come and stay again well done to all the staff brilliant holiday and made out stay wonderful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Certain Staff members could have been more helpful obliging Some were excellent while others were somewhat rude  Bedroom was lovely comfortable room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Price a little expensive  The bed was the most comfortable that I d been in The smart featured TV added for a nice effect rather than just having regular channels to choose from The whole room was modern and sleek in design with the wet room style bathroom being a great feature to the room This is an excellent hotel with very welcoming staff members who are more than happy to help

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The restaurant was closed when we got back from the boxing albeit we were very late because the boxing overran   The staff couldn t do enough to help They made our stay a pleasure

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Location Was a little out of the way although the free shuttle to Canary Wharf helped We were unable to leave our cases whilst we went shopping and had lunch as it was too much of a trek to return to pick them up   Lovely modern comfortable hotel with good facilities

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I would have liked the 2 beds I paid for instead of the 1 I got I would have liked my teammate not to have to sleep on the floor when we were competing at the O2 arena the next day

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The loud music from a party downstairs It would ve been nice if the staff let their guests know about the late night party and loud music after quiet hours   Great location Cleanliness of the room comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing Was perfect   The staff All the staff were first class special mention to Layla who was exceptional This is an excellent hotel in every aspect

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: 1 Bar fridge was locked electronically was told that reception would unlock it but did not happen 2 I was doing business near Bank so location not best but hotel itself was very nice 3 Gym is overcrowded with machines but may suit large sports clientele which they get  1 Breakfast was very good as was dinner the Haddock is excellent 2 Bar restaurant area was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Not very well signposted from the main road Very frustrating booking process despite providing full names and details rooms were under children s names booked a number of rooms together Enquired about parking spaces but not told there was valet parking not a big problem but just basic information that could have been provided when asked Would have been nice to have complimentary breakfast or something as a token though appreciate that s a nice to have rather than something to expect   Nice breakfast polite staff when in person less helpful on the phone nice room clean good facilities nice to have both shower and bath River view rooms were recommended

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Ventilation and heating and cooling in the room was not set up correctly you could not turn down the air con enough and the room was too hot due to the solar gain in the room early in the morning But that was the only issue   Rooms were of a good size and the bed was wonderfully comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Walk from East India Station late at night Access on foot could be better Maybe when building works are finished  View overlooking the river from the restaurant breakfast are

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Shuttle service was limited getting to the hotel via public service isn t straightforward so I think accessibility needs to be addressed Bigger cups for tea or coffee in the bedroom would be good And teeny little pats of butter for large slices of toast with morning breakfast isn t a good idea either  The hotel looked quite smart clean modern with good views of the O2 the Thames Our bedroom was reasonably roomy came supplied with hairdryer iron ironing board trouser press smart tv free wi fi Pillows were lovely comfy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing to comment on here as the hotel itself and the service was great   Smart hotel Very comfortably furnished room Very friendly staff Good restaurant

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Was just too expensive period and then was a small basic room Didn t like art as choice for my room Didn t find anything to really make the cost justified My meeting was there so it was convenient Good meeting room Good catering

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The location was easy to get around the area the staff were amazing and helpful Loved the room was very elegant neat and clean Breakfast was superb and satisfying Loved the view outside my room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: This would certainly not put me off booking again but unfortunately we found the parking an issue On arrival due unattended cars left in the middle of the road We waited almost 15 mins behind an umaned vehicle which blocked our enterance to the hotel  The overall experience was excellent and would certainly book to re visit over other hotels in London The room was immaculate very comfortable and incredible views The choice at breakfast was fantastic along with very reasonable costs The staff were very attentive professional and friendly Absolutely gorgeous hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We had no hot water the first night so had to go out dirty It wasn t fixed until the Sunday morning yet we were charged full price Very poor   The Hotel is clean tidy and comfortable breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: One tv remote for two TVs check it lady was rude Silly rules like having to ring down in the morning for late checkout kind of defeats the object of late check out Breakfast in bed was a little over priced   Roon service staff are delightful helpful and very polite The rooms were amazing everything was how we expected it to be

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The location involves a short stroll to East India or Blackwall DLR stations which for some may feel a little off the beaten track however the hotel provide free car shuttles to Canana Water station which is much more useful of a stop   On discovering the trip was over my husband s 40th birthday we arrived at the hotel to receive a complimentary room upgrade Not only that but the room had been decorated with towe swans and rose petals and there was a birthday cake and hand signed card on the desk Fantastic personal touches from the loveliest friendliest staff and use of the spa steam room and sauna at our disposal Fantastic

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Would be nice if room key could give you access to the gym during closing time but it s not a major thing Just a bonus   The spa is amazing the view is beautiful comfy bed in spacious rooms very friendly and helpful staff breakfast was 10 10 I couldn t fault my stay in any way I m looking to return very soon

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I missed the hint about shuttle services to from the Canary Wharf Tube station At least there was always an Uber within 4 minutes wait and the charge was only 5GBP Location is an expensive neighborhood with respect to available pubs or restaurants Twenty pounds sterling for a full English Breakfast Ouch   The candy bar and fresh fruit throughout the day was a nice treat The room size was on par with anything you d find in a comparable price range in the US and the bathroom was very clean modern and spacious Concierge services were very professional and helpful when I realized that I had to be to the airport before the nearest Tube station even started running I paid comparable rates for far lesser accommodations at different times during my 3 trips in out of London over a 3 week period

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Brilliant stay Beautiful hotel with friendly and efficient staff Couldn t have had a more pleasant trip Recommended already and plan to stay again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: All Good   Great location near DLR and therefore easy access to O2 and city of London Check in out was quick and efficient Rooms very good Breakfast also excellent Car parking a little confusing as managed to park in the street just under 24hrs The hotel desk had mentioned 14 so be prepared to pay just in case

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  We checked in two hours early the hotel was so helpful in accommodating our needs We were given a free upgrade and the room was amazing Fantastic choice at breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Sounds really petty but there wasn t a bar of soap in bathroom with the other toiletries only liquid soaps which I m sensitive too other than that hotel was great   The hotel was very clean great location staff ready bar was nice cocktails very delicious service was fantastic very comfortable and welcoming River view rooms were gorgeous at night and during the day Gym was good overall a great place to stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Couldnt have asked for more   Amazing place Excellent facilities very friendly staffs Very good food Location OK You will need everything you wanted for No need to step out of hotel for anything Good choice of drinks and has Good resturant They gave a free upgrade to King size room Whatever is showen in the picture is Exact and view from the rooms is excellent Overall its awesome

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast was quite dear even though I explained I only wanted a porridge   Travelled for an exam so needed a good sleep the night before bed was awesome shower was brilliant and Wifi was perfect so I could get some work done

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: There could have been more choice in local restaurants but we loved the Italian nearby  The venue was a stones throw away from an event we were attending in London Fields And the hotel was clean staff were friendly and the decor made it feel really romantic

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Disappointed with smoked haddock for breakfast as not sure it was freshly cooked However overall food was very good both for evening meal and breakfast   Bed very comfortable Good bathroom facilities and very clean Perfect for O2 Venue

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bar area was a little uninspiring staff could be more switched on to good service it was OK but only OK Greeting at check in was a little unprofessional and a bit too jokey rude  Excellent suite

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   The service we experienced was fantastic as were the staff who were only too happy to help The range of food at breakfast was brilliant we were spoilt for choice We would definitely recommend to others and stay there again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: From arriving at the hotel and being greeted and booked in the impression of the hotel both aesthetically and as portrayed by the staff could not have been better

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast was quite standard Luke warm coffee spa hotel but no treatments available as you have to book 2 weeks in advance so my wife was very dissappointed   Very pleasant staff clean hotel nice bathrooms comfortable beds in a good location

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The glasses had lipstick stains and were covered in plastic clearly wasn t cleaned before hand The bathroom had water every where before we even used the room   Room service

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Ridiculous service charge 4 on a 25 bottle of wine added to bar bills and I d stood at the bar for 10 mins Refused to pay it and it was taken off So beware   Great location for the O2 17 taxi journey Great value hotel Fab breakfast Would definitely go back

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Check in was confusing with different charges to the original booking and took a while to sort out  The fact that the hotel recognised the service was not smooth and gave us complimentary chocolate strawberries in our room which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The view was the only thing as we were over looking the apartment across the road and the building site   Friendliness of the staff Made to feel welcome and very helpful Couldn t ask for more

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Like everything about this hotel Have stayed here a few times in last 2 yrs Location for 02 is perfect On my most recent stay my 9yr old son and myself stayed to attend some boxing On checking in i just mentioned that it had been my sons birthday earlier in the week and on returning the hotel had left a card and a tray of mini cakes in our room My son was bowled over by the thoughtfulness He also received a free breakfast in the morning As our stay was a birthday treat the hotel made our stay just that extra bit special Many thanks

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The view  The facilities are good staff members were okay hidden charges you are not told about when ordering room service Just let us know upfront it wouldn t like were cheated

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It could not in our opinion been any better  We liked everything about the Hotel The iron was the only fault it came apart when picked up Food excellent the bar very very comfy to relax Breakfast very very good Staff happy and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The only 1 thing i could say that needs to be better was the pressure of the shower not stong enough   R om excelant food very nice prices for drink ok staff very good spa amazing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The guest relation staff made my birthday very special with card strawberries rose petals and swans absolutely brilliant stay everybody was fantastic

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Service charge we always tip in cash for good service This was not a problem as your staff sorted this but it is the embarrassment of asking   All your staff were extremely helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No hot plates for cooked breakfast a shower that had hot water and a late night room service that did not accomodate an egg mayo baguette in wholemeal roll as they had run out I am diabetic and cannot have white bread   could not fault the staff Efficient polite helpful and courteous

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything about our stay at this hotel from reception restaurant bar singer in evening and of course our room was to a high standard friendly and inviting

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: shame about the view from the 1 bed suite but we were only there for one night for a concert at the 02 so it didn t really matter  very friendly and helpful check in staff friendly and efficient waiting staff lovely view from restaurant great concierge excellent taxi recommend Carrott cars very comfortable room bed pillows bed linen Loved the bathroom Loved the complimentary sweetie cart in reception on arrival cute touch Room service was very efficient for glasses ice lemon slices breakfast was excellent with a mini heated trolley for the cooked items Loved the colour scheme and wall art

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Booked as it says it is 0 4 miles to the 02 but that is across water taxi cost 18 and took around 35 minutes   Staff were really nice helpful Hotel is furnished very well was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The Windows all need a really good clean they where filthy   The hotel was lovely the staff where all really friendly and helpful and the breakfast was perfect as for the room the bed was super comfy and the shower was amazing D

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I checked in after nine pm so I was a little confused about how the valet parking worked so I just parked the car myself   The room was really spacious clean nice with a nice view of the Thames from the window The decor was modern and really stylish The bed was really comfortable had a great nights sleep The TV system was easy to use and had a great range of things to watch

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bed to hard and I like hard Pillows far to soft   Overall hotel was very good clean welcoming and a great price Rooms were very good Breakfast was excellent The look of the resturant was great but we were out for the night so did not dine

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: down side is its a max 5 minute walk to the O2 but the thames get in the way so it costs 40 in taxi fares to get there and back frustrating  Nice clean nice looking comfortable hotel with very good facilities

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The food we had as evening meal was definitely under par When I asked for garlic mushrooms in a cream sauce on sourdough bread it was greasy and soggy toast the same was the experience of cheese turnovers on champ literally 2 soggy cheese pasties on mash potato the cream sauce tasted literally like cream with green chives tasteless We expected a much higher standard that matched the quality of the hotel and stay utterly disappointed Especially as it was a celebration trip for my husbands birthday We did mention this at check out to the lady at reception who s name escapes me but she was so helpful PR We were offered an apology and service charge refunded   The room was beyond expectation Overlooking the Thames with a fantastic view Beautiful large room with excellent facilities and so clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Lack of plug sockets With laptop iPad camera 2 iPhones to charge there was not enough sockets One on right side of bed none on left Also booked as proximity to O2 Arena but once there did not find it an easy journey to from it   Lovely hotel lovely room Great shower Sky News Sports on TV rare for a hotel Great breakfast too which can be brought to your room

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It s a small thing but I was a little disappointed when the reception desk could not help when I asked for some matches or a lighter as I had lost mine I appreciate it was very late at night but I am sure he could have helped   Rooms nice and spacious and very comfy Great breakfast too The customer relations lady was also extremely courteous happy and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The space for hanging clothes and the drawers were in the very big bathroom which I thought was strange but not a real problem Although there was coffee tea making facilities there was no hot chocolate and no biscuits Breakfast was a bit pricey  The room was spacious the bed huge and comfortable The d cor of the whole place was tasteful The staff were polite friendly and helpful The food was excellent and I loved the eating area with the view of the river and the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff are so friendly obliging will go out of their way to do anything for you The hotel is clean classy comfortable This is by far the best place to stay if like us youre visiting the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: lovely shower in the semi wet room bathroom BUT didn t drain quick enough so bathroom was v close to flooding a couple of times   Nice breakfast not cheap but I suppose London prices Very friendly and helpful staff Nice bar Good valet parking 14 for a day pretty good in London April 2016

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Over ripped fruits overlooked meat during the last 2 days of stay probably reheated last supplies for the week Otherwise excellent choices of food  Accommodating staff although some only

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: in my eyes NOTHING everything was excellent 100 per cent excellent  i was just amazed at the size of everything my mum booked this for us and she asked for a special request for a walk in shower as I have disabilities im 32 yrs old I actually foned my mum to tell her how WOW this hotel was the whole experience was amazing thank you so so much not only did I have a walk in shower but an extra large bath too I was totally blown away by the size of the room and the service was second to none

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Pool Table was always covered up prices of mini bar were expensive asked for twin beds and got a king size  The food was excellent the room was very very nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   I am very pleased with the service provided and was really happy the staff did a little suprise in my room for my partner as it was her birthday Overall I will 100 be staying again next time I m in London

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: no direct footpath to O2 arena if you go to a concert you will have to pay ca 18 for a one way taxi ride or take the DLR and change once back to the Underground one of the reception staff had quite the attitude while trying to order my taxi Not at me but at the cab company Rolling her eyes and huffing arrogantly into the phone I would expect more professionalism from front staff Came back from the concert to be met by police and screaming guests and night staff It was rather unpleasant to squeeze by a police officer blocking the entrance Views where of another office building close the blinds and a building site Not many amenities around the hotel as far off the beaten track  great modern rooms fantastic bath and waterfall shower complimentary coffee in room quiet room bed very comfortable and big receptionist checking me in was very nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The weather   We were contacted before our arrival by phone and email The staff were welcoming and attentive We had a free upgrade our room was lovely with a large very comfortable bed The breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I looked for hotel based on proximity to o2 Had I journey planned on a map and realised it was tricky it would have put me off but if it was made more obvious that there was a shuttle when booking that would have negated this   Very friendly and helpful staff Useful having shuttle to Canada Water although this could have been made more obvious online

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing Had an amazing stress free stay and I would love to go back   The staff at the hotel were absolutely amazing So friendly and helpful Lovely to have a chat to The bedroom and bathroom were spotless and the hotel was stunning The Scoff and Banter restaurant had an excellent value menu with views of the o2 which made the night extra special

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Sumptuous room VERY comfortable beds and a perfect location for the O2 All staff very friendly Only had breakfast but there was a vast array to choose from which was hot and replenished frequently

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The only issue was at check in as our booking was not easily identifiable Booking com had sent the hotel the booking under my first name and the surname of the guest which meant our check in wasn t easy to find But the hotel were great   The hotel has fantastic customer service which we received from Guest Services Our room was amazing with great views and the little touches like the turn down service and receiving strawberries dipped in chocolates and a personalised note Breakfast room service was served on a trolley with a heated compartment that converted into a breakfast table with flowers it was fantastic We can t wait to return

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing Everything was wonderful  It was my mums birthday so they left us a complimentary birthday cake in her room for her which was a lovely gesture

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I thought the umbrella was free   I was amazed by the facilities and hospitalities The bed was a very generous size the shower was incredible the TV was of good quality with many channels even one dedicated to using fish tanks for relaxation it works Finally even the bin was slanted for ultimate use Written by the 12 year old costumer on behalf of my father

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: One particular staff member was quite abrupt and rude I felt she was trying to be funny but was actually quite offensive the view of the building works was a let down for the cost of room   The cleanliness and comfort of the room water bottles for arrival were appreciated Didn t get to use the facilities due to short stay but great value for money most staff members very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff were incredibly accommodating and couldn t have been more friendly and welcoming if they tried The complimentary breakfast was a wonderful start to the day and it was so lovely to be able to eat breakfast with a view of the O2 The location was perfect for what we had planned with a short walk from Canary Wharf underground although a complimentary shuttle service is available The bed was incredibly comfy and the room as a whole was clean and well thought out The smart tv was a nice touch too as well as each room having its own free wifi The bathroom was wonderful with a walk in shower and a separate bath and it was all very clean You couldn t have wanted more An excellent hotel with wonderful staff and the breakfast is divine Would definitely return

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Dinner was expensive for what you got I had the lamb rump 5 small pieces for 20 my wife had the haddock which has soft batter The pillows were too hard not a great view from our room which wasn t the room I had secured online   the room was comfortable and very quiet lovely bath breakfast was amazing staff very friendly and helpful very handy for O2 Although a boat over to the O2 would have been excellent and DLR links would recommend to others

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cooked Breakfast was poor for me as I am a vegetarian Bar was very expensive and limited in choice for beers Service charge is something I hate made even worse when you think the staff are being nice in saying I will bring your drinks over it so they can charge you   Hotel and Staff were excellent as was the location even though it s a bit expensive to get to the O2 by taxi 20 each way

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: On foot we really struggled to find it Coming back late From the O2 we were a bit disappointed by the choices of room service food But the baguette we had was okay and the service was great   It was very stylish breakfast was great Staff super nice and helpful They offered a shuttle bus to the O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Rainfall showers are a major inconvinience when trying to keep your hair dry The beds were rock hard The service at the bar was poor orders were forgotten the wrong drinks were bought out and we had to order sandwiches three times before they finally settled on fillings they could offer One of our party had two lots of breakfast added to their bill when they questioned this at check out the receptionist was rather rude and just replied well did you have two breakfasts   The pillows were amazing which vaguely made up for the rock hard bed The location was perfect for a visit for The O2

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Hot breakfast was disappointing Items ordered from menu took too long to arrive and were not of quality expected from this grade of hotel   Friendly and helpful reception staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: staff on front desk the manageress who promised to meet us who sent a trainee instead lack of honesty and care in dealing with people  the room was ok

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Poorly trained check in staff misleading literature the attempt to fob us off with a Downgrade without an offer for recompense resulting in an upgrade which was confusing as the room overlooked the very ugly Blackwall tunnel ventilation shaft   The bed was superb

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We left our room for a couple of hours and when we returned all the pillows and cushions had been removed off the bed our room had already been cleaned and seen to earlier that day just left us a bit confused as to why someone entered the room again   The view Breath taking especially if you wake up early enough to watch the sunrise Our room was so spacious wonderful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Maybe in the future add a jacuzzi to the spa   Staff was very polite and friendly Helpful also There was a problem with our room bed but the issue was fixed with no hassle and they moved us to a new bedroom I ordered the rose petals and chocolate strawberries and it was amazing to see that the hotel gave us a cake with a card too Very impressed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Our room was allocated to another guest possibly a computer error We Opened the door to find another person in the room already We had to be given a different room Very confusing as they thought I was the one who had already checked in when I first arrived The staff never actually explained what the error was I was left wondering if someone had used my details We later found out same thing happene to another couple They told us someone was already occupying their room when they arrived At least their key wouldn t open the door for that room Mine did It was rather embarrassing I shan t explain why I wonder if this is a common occurrence and if so why   Friendly staff Good service overall Clean rooms

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The room was a little cramped considering it was a complimentary upgrade and we had booked a single bed to go into the room   Price was very competitive and close to the O2 arena the reason for our visit The concierge in the evening with the free taxi to canary wharf was very unexpected

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Prices of drinks  Bedroom was great especially the bathroom had bath and shower Location was easy to get to the 02 Was an anniversary and they left some strawberries and a card which was a lovely suprise So make sure u tell them if it is an anniversary

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I booked my trip with booking com they sent me a text to say I could check in and pay online so I thought I d do this to make it easier for when I arrived but they tried to charge me again for the hotel on arrival which I said and proved to them that I had already paid for the hotel the reception staff asked me to send an email to her so she could send it on they gave us our key to the room until the check out came the following day they tried to make me pay for the hotel again and I explained the situation of events the day before and they said that was fine we check out to only come home and find a second payment was taken without my knowledge Really not happy about the level of knowledge when booking online with the staff on site

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Public transport links could have been more convenient   The relaxation room in the spa had a great view of the o2 The restaurant also has a lovely terrace with this view Modern stylish feel and decor Nice and clean Definitely more of an upper market hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We ordered some chips at the bar was surprised by the fact they were handed to us such a small portion very salty 2015 we stayed and was bigger portion and more like french fries  Everything always love staying in this hotel Breakfast was perfect staff are brilliant Unfortunate had to leave

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I ve stated in excess of 50 hotels in the last couple of years this has been by far the most outstanding service I ve received even compared to some 5 star accommodations Staff were amazing Will definitely re visit

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The breakfast service left something to be desired we were left without a table on the first day and on the second day we were sat at a dirty table with a promise that they would clear it but waited 10 mins and had to remind them   The breakfast was wonderful food Room service was excellent Spacious very comfortable room with lovely bathroom Good location to see gigs at the O2 easy to get to from hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Taxi services of the hotel are not very trustful One driver tried to overcharge more than 20 on an already steep price another one trying to charge nearly double They try to cheat on unwary tourists where they can The Hotel should be more attentive on the company they recommend and their drivers   Very friendly helpful staff Great receptionist Luci from Venezuela a very helpful Head Concierge Richard

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: could have been made to feel more welcome   Great bedroom bathroom and lady on reception on way out Lola Very quiet and didn t hear any other guests Sound proofed effectively

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   The receptionist was able to organise early checkin her name was Lori and she arranged a birthday cake to be delivered to my room along with a card signed by some of the staff The room was amazing breathtaking view Will be back management please pass along my comments you don t often get service that would make a hotel a first choice for return trips

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hair dryer was a bit dangerous could end up tangling your hair up in the back of the hair dryer Shame check in was 2 hours late   I loved the walk in shower and I slept really well

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We stayed in one of the deluxe rooms with a river view The view was absolutely amazing Good location great value for money really cannot fault it

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Can t complain about anything in this visit  Very comfortable and welcoming room Large bedroom windows letting in a lot of light Well kept facilities and staff were very pleasant and helpful Would recommend and will stay again Can t comment on the restaurants as I didn t use them but the gym although small was clean air conditioned and had enough equipment cardio weights to satisfy my two night stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything as execellent no complaints about anything wonderful location wonderful staff wonderful clean spacious room Would highly recomend and stay again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Staff seemed a little confused Buffet breakfast kept running low and we had to keep asking for things to be replenished Strange artwork in the bedrooms which weren t quite appropriate if travelling with children Only bedroom view we had was of the block of flats opposite but if we craned our neck we could just see the river   Comfortable beds lovely pillows

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: From the moment you step foot inside the hotel the service facilities and ambience was excellent The staff were friendly and extremely helpful in all areas of the hotel The food in the restaurant was amazing and the room and conference facilities were comfortable and well equipped The parking facilities were hassle free and with a hotel in London it was very accessible

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast was a little predictable Shower was a little weirdly positioned but it was a smallish bathroom  Lovely hotel good location to Excel Exhibition Centre Comfortable beds Lovely view of the O2 from the dining room It was comfortable and gives you everything that a 4 hotel would Would recommend it to any traveller wanting to be in the Canary Wharf area

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: As I didn t book directly they wouldn t give me the easter special offer which included a chocolate egg and breakfast so I ended up paying more and no easter egg Clothes rail was in the bathroom which was a little quirky   Breakfast buffet was delicious Great pastries and the scrambled eggs and sausages were lovely Staff were very professional and friendly View from terrace across river to O2 was a lovely way to start the day Really enjoyed the steam room sauna Shuttle was actually taxis phone ahead if you need collection from Canary Wharf

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We arrived on the water taxi we struggled to find the hotel we eventually found out it was one stop on the DLR When we arrived there was nowhere to eat and an hour wait for food we couldn t even get crisps from the crowded bar We were mislead about a 10 minute walk to the o2 that what it said on the web site when we booked We had to pay 18 for a taxi   The hotel was very modern

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: For events and functions at the 02 or surrounding area this hotel served perfectly and the facilites staff breakfast and room were great especially the price
