Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Breakfast suffered from lack of hot food empty trays for a long time Too few staff for number of customers Had to wait ages for coffee ended up going to find a waitress instead   Lovely room and easy access to the O2 just two stops on tube Reception staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: As booked superior room thought it would have a view so disappointed Lack of bar staff in the evening had to wait in a queue fo 10 minutes no choice of table service   Check in out staff very helpful Very comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: More storage for clothes wardrobe ect A fridge without stuff in it   Bed was very comfortable beautiful area and very friendly staff Overall was a very pleasant stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing   Service and staff were all fantastic and helpful Nothing was too much trouble Very courteous and attentive whilst having the ability to blend into the background

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: room was too warm over night the air conditioning didn t seem to make a difference   the rooms was very spacious the beds were very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: couldnt be better   the staff were fantastic especially Clea as she was there our whole visit and we felt we knew her and she knew us we love the 15 credit for a drink the sweet counter the water drinks in the room and in the foyer the bathrooms were outstanding in the bar Our room was amazing for only 5 upgrade we will definitiely recommend it to everyone as there are photos of that amazing bathroom in 330 going to all our friends well done everyone love it

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Wish you d build a bridge to the O2 It looks within touching distance from our room but actually takes 25 mins and 20 in a taxi during rush hour A bridge or boat would be fab   Lovely room Modern and comfortable Staff were friendly and helpful Bar was very pleasant

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Bubble and squeak horrid basically mashed potato with small bits of bacon in it  Beds very comfortable very clean hotel and rooms and a fabulous bathroom We did pay extra for the river view but it is worth it

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: the room was smaller then expected for the pictures seen it was more standard type room when i paid nearly 200 for the night for superior room  staff was friendly and helpfull i went with my mum for her birthday treat

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Real ale please if not on pull get some decent bottled brews in Big out cry for craft beers given the prices you charge could make a small fortune and folks happy   Birthday cake for my wife nice touch staff knowledgeable and friendly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It says on trip advisor that the hotel is 0 5 miles away from the o2 but it turns out actually it s a long travel and we had to get a taxi which cost 18 each way   The room was beautiful and the buffet breakfast was the best we have ever had

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The view from the room was a building site We would have liked a view of the river   The room was very comfortable and the breakfast was excellent with a great choice of both continental and full English breakfast We also had a lovely meal in the restaurant It was in a great area to access the tube and to get to Central London and the O2 The staff were amazing They couldn t do enough for us Staff were extremely helpful which made our stay very enjoyable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  Gorgeous hotel Brilliant location for 02 we went on Emirates skyline then Thames river cruiser into the tourist areas Cheap economical way to travel into London and so much fun Staff are so helpful polite Immaculately clean Would definitely go again Soon i hope

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel was amazing The views brilliant The bed was so comfy for a good night s sleep Staff was all friendly willing to help and chatty to ask us about our stay and what we was doing whilst visiting London

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Whilst the hotel is quite close to the O2 the taxi was a bit of a nightmare getting back to the hotel  Staff were extremely helpful and room extremely comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Parking charges  Excellent staff could teach the west end hotels a few things about service Outstanding staff who went above and beyond Will be back

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: I liked everything at this hotel The hotel room and other areas of the hotel were spotlessly clean The staff were very polite friendly and helpful Breakfast was lovely and plenty of choice We ate our breakfast with a beautiful view Possibly the nicest hotel I ve ever stayed in

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The bar shut earlier than I expected and the room wasn t ready on arrival and we weren t given a time as to when it would be  Reception staff very friendly

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cost When we returned at night really wanted a coffee but non available as machine not working was very frustrating  Very costly realise in central London the hotel was exceptional but just not value for money I expect was hugely inflated due to the Brits on at 02

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Unclean failure to inform of charge for valet parking there was also an event on and the music was that loud in the hotel our room was vibrating   Shower was lovely and room was modern

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Staff were excellent bedroom was very clean and well equipped Very good breakfast in a pleasant dining room Will be my hotel of choice in that part of London

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything was perfect for my stay a special thanks to CHER manager of guest relations if I m not mistaken along with the whole staff from my check in to check out highly recommend

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Some of the Reception staff not very professional could have been more helpful  Lovely breakfast plenty of choice we were seated by the window we had a lovely view of the thames and staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Hotel lovely but not in the best position to get to the O2 need to book a taxi both ways   Room excellent sweeties help yourself pick and mix nice touch Taxi from hotel excellent recommend Carrott Cars Nice views at breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cooked breakfast items ran out and everyone milling around the serving area waiting for more to artive  The bed was very comfy but what made our stay really great was the fab staff friendly helpful courteous and genuinely wanted us to enjoy our stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Would have liked the shuttle service to be available over a longer period but not a true dislike   Very helpful pleasant and welcoming staff throughout the hotel Clean and comfortable room Super breakfast Shuttle to Canary Wharf a very good idea

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: View from room was not great it over looked some sort of large concrete chimney structure but as we were only there one night it didn t matter to us The towels were a bit hard and rough I was expecting nice soft ones as the room was quite luxurious in every other detail In September they are having a boat to take you to the O2 which was where we were going its a shame it wasn t already running   Nice clean large room Bed was comfortable no traffic noise Food in the restaurant was lovely and we were seated in the conservatory area which looked across the water to the O2 arena The non alcoholic cocktails are delicious

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Stayed here due to going to the 02 and although they are not far away from each other they are on opposite sides of the Thames Was helpful to take the free hotel shuffle to Canary Wharf and then just one stop on the tube   Lovely room and facilities

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cleaning could pay just a little closer attention to detail but overall it is an excellent property The most irritating factor is probably the Guest Services Agent who answers each time you phone for anything within the hotel and then redirects your call or takes a message I far prefer to contact a Department directly rather than having to relay to Guest Services that i would like Reception to contact me about my stay for example Why go through all that when i can simply call Reception myself   This Radisson property is now much improved There were some issues on previous visits with incompetent staff however the guest experience is a wonderful quick and smooth one these days Really enjoyed my brief stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: On arrival and being booked in receptionist was a bit too scripted relax and smile a little please it is not a sprint Other wise a job well done Thank you  Enjoyed my breakfast and the varied selection of options available Well presented and hot cooked breakfast Bella

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Cleanliness a little poor stains on carpets and bed spreads No umbrellas to borrow Kind of hidden away in a new and bland area   Food and service were good Tv and Internet also good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing it was terrific  This is a really nice hotel all round the bar restaurant area overlooking the Thames is lovely the rooms are clean modern and hi tech The breakfast was exceptional I spent Saturday evening propping up the bar and had my dinner there too the staff were all very nice

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: My husband did tell hotel reception it was my bday but no recognition of this  2nd visit and just as impressed would definitely stay again Staff super helpful and happy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It was a little hard to find  They upgraded us to Business Class got free with a complimentary Breakfast Staff all helpful and nice lovely clean room with great TV system great food at affordable price Lovely view at breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Comfy bed great staff couldn t fault anything We stayed at this hotel to go see Jason derulo playing at the 02 and at first didn t realise that this hotel was across the river from the 02 however the hotel puts on a shuttle service that takes you to Canary Wharf underground and it s just 1 stop which makes it ever so easy

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: This hotel is splendid and the staff are amazing and attentive I really liked Eric as he was very pleasant and helpful I will defo be coming here again The room we stayed in was a deluxe King room this room was big in size and the room looked amazing with a nice big tv

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Having the do not disturb sign and still the cleaning lady calling at the door Reception staff not well informed about the shuttle service   Very comfortable bedroom and bathroom attention to details great toileteries Nespresso machine Great breakfast and spa

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Would have loved if there was beef sausages on the breakfast menu as well as vegetarian as some people don t eat pork   The suite was amazing the bed was extra comfortable

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The staff were so lovely the breakfast included was delicious there s a free shuttle service to Canary Wharf station the location is beautiful and good proximity to the O2 honestly such a wonderful hotel

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Polish security guard who was chasing me around the hotel and the fact they charged me for an intimacy kit   Bar rooms breakfast location valet parking room service

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Booked this hotel as we had tickets for the 02 arena and it states on the web page that the hotel is 0 5 miles away However this is not the case an we spent a fortune on taxis  Beautiful hotel amazing room and breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing I have nothing but praise  This hotel was outstanding we had a complimentary upgrade and they even put a birthday cake in room for sister The staff were excellent and nothing was too much trouble for them The location was amazing and I would recommend this hotel to anyone We enjoyed our stay so much I have already booked another weekend away here

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Noise from the room next door having a party at 1am having to call reception to complain also at breakfast stood waiting to be sat at a table and people pushing in front the member of staff just shrugged his shoulders   Lovely and modern

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hot water is set at 38 degrees on maximum which feels warm Sadly I was longing to have a hot bath   The Room Service was exceptionally good Please try the Sticky Toffee Pudding desert Absolutely divine

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel charged us twice once with card we checked in with and again with the final card we wanted to use for payment What s worse is that hotel doesn t want to refund us with one payment even though we presented statement evidence

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No coffee in the room  Nice location close to excel centre Accessible to central London via DLR The hotel is walking distance to 2 stations Breakfast is good

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Staff not coming into the room without knocking at 8 9am this was very poor for us but when mentioned to staff at front desk they were very understanding and accommodating to this   Hotel was lovely really enjoyed our stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Staff were happy to help from the offset We was asked for preference of floor to stay on and we was catered for straight away The room was clean and tidy and had a great view of the Thames We had dinner at the Scoff and Banter at the hotel service again could not of been topped it was prompt and staff again so friendly made you relax We ordered room service for our breakfast for 07 30 usually you would expect a few minutes over specified time but as it 07 30 the door went and we was served a wonderful array of fruits l fresh juice pastries hot drinks and a full English breakfast We left the room to check out and every member of the staff in the hallways cleaning greeted us with a good morning and smile which sets your day off to a great start We thoroughly enjoyed are stay and will be back in the future

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything The one bedrooom apartmnent was impressive The staff were the best freindly helpful and professional making you feel very welcome Would recommend this hotel 10 out of 10

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing It was great If they had a swimming pool it would be even better   Everything I called up a few days before to and told them it was my boyfriend s birthday When we got to the hotel it looked amazing the lady who checked us in was so polite and efficient We got the room and it was set to perfection The room was set up and my boyfriend got a birthday treat too Less than 10 mins after getting to the room room service came to check that everything in the room was omay and to ask if we needed anything The spa facilities were really good too The breakfast in the morning was amazing food was 10 10 We loved it Service was amazing and the hotel is amazing My boyfriend enjoyed his birthday and I will definitely be back here again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: When entering the room we found the toilet was still in a mess from the previous customer The minibar did not open but that did not stop the staff coming to our door to ask if we had taken anything from it and even wanted to inspect it And after that the safe wasnt working on the first night so we had to walk around with our valuables on our person We also faced a building site and were woken up at 6am NOT what i was looking forward to   Beautiful room and overall hotel nice staff and good taxi service

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel adds two additional charges for every room service order And pool table was always broken With different excuses every day   Beautiful hotel with very nice rooms delicious breakfast and comfy bed

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We got a good deal on the room however for a 4 star hotel I would expect the rooms to be cleaner Our room was dusty and the bed sheets were stained  Good location for canary what s with free shuttle service and breakfast is included

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Great hotel with all the facilities and amenities I need The location is ideal for Canary Wharf London City Airport and O2 Arena Very friendly and always ready to help staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Second stay here beautiful hotel with excellent facilities and attention to detail Hotel were made aware it was an anniversary stay and we were given chocolate dipped strawberries and a card in our room Will definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Problems on checking in and checking with pre authorisation and deposit just hope the money gets put back on the on the card Also a bit of noise from building works so would of been nice to have river facing view but that can t be helped   Lovely room beautiful bathroom

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The hotel charged the payment twice on the card we checked in with and then another card we used when checked out with final bill Contacted hotel a few times but hotel is reluctant to refund us even though we showed our bank statements This has caused us time and hassles to try and sort out this unnecessary issue which caused by hotel lack of efficiency and good service by hotel is out of line Will be seeking legal advice if necessary

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It was difficult to find hotel from Canary Wharf underground station Even local police struggled to give us directions There were no clear signs anywhere in the near vicinity   Staff were friendly helpful Rooms were very comfortable Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: noise from other rooms The walls were of travelodge standard Shower was poor Chair in suite was broken Staff response to my comments Breakfast was decent but compared to European Radisson hotels poor Views of other hotels and rooms Close to DLR 5 7 min walk  modern decor comfortable bed large rooms windows Good A C

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: 14 per day parking charge is a bit too much this should be free or at least under 10 People would look more into staying extra days as the hotel is brilliant   The staff were friendly and very helpful and the breakfast and dinner was perfect i couldnt ask for anything more The rooms was very clean and comfy I actually liked everything about this hotel and the view

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Whilst we didn t have a problem personally you could see that as breakfast was getting busier the staff were struggling to cope you needed to have a dedicated person signing everyone in and others to escort guests to a table   Fantastic river view room overlooking the O2 Arena Surprise treat of strawberries dipped in chocolate left in our room with a card to celebrate our wedding anniversary what a lovely personal touch to add Had a wonderful break and breakfast was vast varied and delicious Thank you

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The room temperature of the restaurant could be a little bit warmer probably due to the big glass window as we felt a little bit cold during the dinner and breakfast But nothing that we could manage   The Staff was very Polite and Friendly we were welcome by Rhima at the check in and despite working on Christmas Eve she was smiling and happy We had dinner at the hotel restaurant and Rita our waitress complete the evening with an excellent service The breakfast was good and full of option plus the view from the tables were spectacular By the end of our stayed Evan brought our car and again always smiling The hotel is not too far from the train station Overall everything was superb

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Me and my girlfriend stayed overnight for her birthday recently and where absolutely amazed by this place It has a very subtle yet stylish decor It s location means it s on the doorstep of all the important local venues and points of interest yet it s set on its very own corner of the river The staff where amazing as I had a few request for my girlfriends birthday and they more then came through We both where very impressed and are already planning our next visit

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The mini bar wasn t stocked Also there were lots of little issues in the spa the attendant wasn t very helpful friendly there weren t any slippers available a speaker was broken and kept making horrible noises there was no water in the sauna Nothing major but a shame as with a few small fixes it would have been lovely   This hotel is really great value for money the facilities size of room and views are brilliant compared to what you get for the same price in central London We were delighted with the service we went for our anniversary and upon arrival found we had been bumped up the penthouse for free They had also left us chocolate covered strawberries and a card Lovely personal touches which absolutely made our day The restaurant downstairs has great views and the food is pretty good The spa is v relaxing

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Spa was closed on Christmas Day although this is probably normal throughout the country   Amazing staff who are really accommodating and friendly and take the approach of making whatever the customer s desire is possible Stunning views of the river and O2 arena as well as a lovely bar and restaurant which we made full use of on both days The relaxation room in the spa is also another feature which makes this hotel an amazing experience

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing I didn t like except 2 pillows instead of one next time  I thought the staff were very polite and the rooms were very clean Would like 2 pillows next time though

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: We endured two hours of unbearable heat in our room reception failed to answer phone for ninety minutes resulting in ringing radios son main booking number to get someone Turned out there was no water in the air con but by then we were exhausted with sinus and breathing pains Headaches for a day Lovely designed room with very poor lighting Room service good but general care awful Only way to get to O2 is taxi and difficult to get back   We endured two hours of unbearable heat in our room reception failed to answer phone for ninety minutes resulting in ringing radios son main booking number to get someone Turned out there was no water in the air con but by then we were exhausted with sinus and breathing pains Headaches for a day Lovely designed room with very poor lighting Room service good but general care awful Only way to get to O2 is taxi and difficult to get back

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The mattress cover sheet was very stained which my wife did not like also the black out curtain was broke  Location was what we wanted at a realistic cost

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Rooms were spacious and clean Had an issue with a round of drinks slow service which was sorted quickly once it had been pointed out to management Courtesy bus to Canary Wharf station was a bonus

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: There was no dressing table for wife to get ready at but there was a desk but with no mirror but nothing that would prevent us from returning  Staff were excellent and really helpful with any request Our room was cleaned in the evening after we got refreshed after travelling with fresh towels etc and our bed was turned down they also do the nicest cheese and onion sandwich ever

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Location right on Thames had a lovely meal overlooking the river Staff excellent Enjoyed live music in bar when returned after the concert at night and it was a great atmosphere

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Taxi called by the hotel to take us to the concert venue was very expensive compared to the taxi we had to return to the hotel  Location the hotel is opposite the O2 very polite and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing  I couldn t fault a thing The staff are so welcoming and can t do enough for you Our room was spotless and the breakfast was amazing Will defiantly stay here again

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: You need a boat straight to the 02 and that would be perfect   Brilliant staff and lovely place to stay I left my jacket there on Sunday 13th December and you posted it free of charge and it arrived on Tuesday Thank you very much for your help

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Booking com is misleading on distance to the o2 it states half a mile which it is if you are willing to swim 18 one way in a taxi if not  Helpfull staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Rooms don t have enough Closet space therefore very cumbersome for someone staying for a week It is like living from suitcase Not enough space to hang store clothes   Location Staff

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Room service had a late night wanted to order alcohol and food Rang 4 5 times then eventually went down to reception Was told shuts at 1am Very poor

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: When we arrived our luggage was taken in and car parked and booking in was prompt Both mornings we had a leisurely breakfast with great selection Most important 2 comfortable nights sleep after very busy days Would book again and would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Only bad thing I would say is it s quiet a far walk from the nearest station so either take a bus or taxi to the actual hotel   Great place to stay Friendly stuff Enjoyed the stay

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Nothing Staff were a little preoccupied One blonde woman at reception was a little unfriendly  We had a river view room which came with an amazing bath and lovely view Free internet and complimentary breakfast

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: The room overlooked other rooms in the hotel despite being the high cost river view option No bedside clock there was one screwed down so I wouldn t steal it but I couldn t see it during the night The lighting system is pathetic and I resorted to removing the card to turn the lights off which meant no air con   Friendly staff in the bar

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Was in town for a conference Price was you a bit high for a one night stay   Great facilities and a friendly staff Comfortable room Great bathroom with an awesome waterfall shower Highspeed internet

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: If going out in central london then not the hotel for you Did phone room service but rang out tried 3 times and no one answered which was dissapointing  The hotel was lovely Staff were nice Got upgraded which was a nice touch Rooms big and clean and beds comfy Going to o2 so the location was perfect

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Unfortunately the bed was very uncomfortable The heating was set very high throughout the hotel glad we had the option to cool down the room independently   Helpful friendly staff made the experience special The overall presentation room location was excellent Breakfast in the room was great quality

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: Everything was wonderful The staff were all so pleasant and helpful the rooms were lovely and comfortable and clean and well equipped we had a delicious lunch in the restaurant and the breakfast the following morning was also delicious We will definitely return

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: No toiletries when housekeeping had gone home for those forgotten Eggs benedict on a Sunday morning best avoid   Excellent rooms Great staff Slick and efficient minicab service by Carrot Super breakfast buffet and a la carte options

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf
Full_Review: It was my girlfriends 40th birthday and she loved it also the upgrade to the suit was fantastic made her day extra special staff were great use of the spa was great and location thank you very much

Hotel_Name: Radisson Blu Edwardian New Providence Wharf

I was with 4 friends in two rooms The room with 3 people in only had one double bed and a put you up style chair bed We did complain and we re moved to a room with two bigger beds but the third bed was still the chair bed Thought the Hilton could do better especially as some families want to be together   Comfy bed good shower great breakfast

The shower was a little difficult in that the water sprayed directly on the vanity if you applied any reasonable pressure This was purely because of the way the bathroom is designed Other than the shower the room was perfect   The hotel was in a good location super close to the tube station Check in was super easy and the staff were very helpful We were given complimentary breakfast at Jamie s Italian the restaurant attached to the hotel Breakfast was AMAZING and the coffee was brilliant super important if you ask me The hotel was very accommodating of our late flight and gave us late check out until 2 pm complimentary

The breakfast was exceptionally poor Looked like a shortage of staff lead to a lack of everything Had to wait so long for the rest of breakfast to arrive that what we had already selected was cold None of the staff were friendly seemed impatient with being asked where things were The eating area looked very tired had been down graded to a cafe with wooden stirrers instead of spoons Left feeling as though we should have eaten out The pillows on the bed smelt of cigarette smoke which we would have changed had it not been so late when we realised Last time we stayed we really enjoyed it that s why we booked again

The tv didn t work and my room wasn t ready when I turned up My shower was cold the on site engineer came to check it out and told me it just takes a while to heat up To be fair after 10 minutes it did get up to warm not ideal if you re in a rush or have a high maintenance girlfriend  Breakfast was excellent the room was a fair size
Nothing to complain about   The location and found the hotel has a relaxing atmosphere after a busy day in London The rooms where good size with good facilities comfortable clean

As I wrote above delay in the rooms being ready   I stayed as part of a family group for one night prior to my son s wedding We asked if the rooms we had reserved could be close together on the same floor and you arranged it thank you Unfortunately none of the rooms were ready when we arrived despite having been told they would be available from 3pm when I rang in advance to ask and mine was the last to be ready and not until about 4 30 That apart the proximity of rooms was excellent Very comfortable beds

We didn t like the fact we couldn t use the roof terrace for a drink as it was my birthday it would have been nice to have had a drink up there in the superb weather we had but that s my only negative  The homemade granola for breakfast in Jamie s was fabulous My room was lovely and I loved the quality of shampoo and body lotion etc
Breakfast is acceptable but choice limited Plugs are UK or Japanese Need to ask for adaptor In such hotel plugs should be international   Location and easy access

Good breakfast in the facilities of Jamie s Italian Nice executive lounge with outside area on balcony with great view of The Shard and more Helpful staff Good location with 5 minutes walk to the Jubilee line and train station

Arrived at 1 45pm and did not get a room until nearly 4pm Then our rooms aircon was broken and we were told we needed to move rooms It was after 6pm by the time they moved us When we left they tried to bill us the full rate not the rate agreed on booking com Overall it s a good hotel but I feel the staff lack training   Clean and functional Location

The bed creaked The terrace bar advertised was only for executives and not for regular guests and for such a big name as Hilton there wasn t exceptional facilities The Tower Guoman across the river is better Value for money debatable   Location was superb and the facilities good although not exceptional Air conditioning was excellent

the breakfast was not very good the cooked items had been standing a while Coffee machine was broken and I had to find a member of staff and ask for coffee when poured out it was stale Our stay was the night of the London Bridge incident   The Reception staff were helpful both before and after the incident
Room was late but we got an upgrade so no problem One of the lights was nor working Main light switch a bit fidley  Excellent Bed and well equipped room

No help with luggage One bathrobe missing Insufficient bathroom shampoo for two Air con awful slept in a room far to hot and air con did not work and yes I did follow the instructions We didn t call for help as we were far to tired and didn t Want to have to wait for assistance and after the service at the concierge we didn t think the hotel could be bothered the room was supposed to be a deluxe which was supposed to include a seating area unless this meant the desk chair there was none I was suspicious this was not a deluxe room I have stayed in American chain hotels before never again in a Hilton   Restaurant and lounge staff were friendly

Hotel was unable to get our cases to our room roomhad unpleasant smell and was not overly clean BUT they did arrange a good discount without us requesting it impressive   Convenience to shard breakfast
Staff were excellent and very helpful but for us it was the location which was right in the area we wanted to explore Very clean to and the barman did a mean Cosmo cocktail

The room was very small and basic Also when asked about promotions the staff had little or no clue what I was talking about When we asked for a knife to chop up fruit in our room the kitchen staff point blank refused In hindsight I wish I had gone and booked a premier inn   Breakfast was good and the room was very clean

Having small change go missing the fridge locked from use although an ice machine was available at the endof the corridor Poor view and extra charge to use the balcony And although the Hilton stressed that our views are important no reply has been received from them addressing our concerns Accurate at the time of writing   Location was excellent front of house staff professional friendly and efficient

I was disappointed about A paying extra for the roof balcony for a special occasion and we wasn t able to use because it shuts at 10pm I wasn t been informed and it wasn t been run briefly what s written on the paper that was given to me I guess it will be a good idea if you run briefly what s on the paper because not all guest have the time to read especially if rushing into something e g like getting ready and going out for dinner B Being disappointed with the receptionist night duty when we are trying to enter to the left side entrance and he showed me a rude gesture instead of saying please use the other entrance door C Same as the door staff whose a bit rude about asking for room key Assuming we wasn t guests Even if it s protocol to ask maybe in a nice way not being so rude I just find it humiliating showing of rudeness Paying that amount of money is not worth to be not treated nice   I like their surprise cake and card They really make it extra special my boyfriend s birthday Thank you for the staff effort

The mini bar is always a source of irritation not enough room to store own milk small food items etc and the sensors are readily activated when items are moved As always the hotel breakfast was far too expensive   Great location just a few minutes walk from the tube the Thames and many tourist attractions with a good choice of venues supermarkets for food and drink Our double deluxe room was spacious quiet and comfortable for three adults with efficient and quiet air conditioning great shower bath tea and coffee facilities It was very hot during our stay so the adjacent water features and breeze from the river were very welcome

Had trouble checking in Did not get into my room until 1745 As it was not ready consequently this had a knock on effect and we missed the start of the show in the West End   Room very clean Staff helpful especially bar staff
It took me speaking to 4 people before I got an answer over which breakfast food was not gluten free Staff need extra training to understand coeliac disease
Staff in the reception didn t even acknowledge you when you went in or out  Popped into the bar for a drink the staff were so friendly and welcoming

Paid for room upgrade but thought room size would reflect this but didn t   Staff were very courteous and the location was excellent The furnishings in the room were good the bed was very comfortable and bathroom facilities were good

I asked for the room to be decorated with balloons flowers cake and petals on the bed On my arrival it was not done and it missed initial surprise and I still had to pay for it   Staff did what they could to make me feel beter

This appears to be a hotel which caters mainly to business people Decor is modern and bland Shades of grey Some rooms have separate bath and shower which we would have preferred Bathtub deep and narrow some difficulty in getting in and out when wet Shower doors tend to allow water to flood the floor Found the air conditioning to be too cold and somewhat noisy Window opens but too noisy outside at night to keep open   Great location for River Thames and river based transportation events restaurants and entertainment All a few minutes away Very close to London Bridge Station Railway and Underground All staff front desk catering and housekeeping efficient and friendly Rooms and adjoining bathrooms clean and comfortable Beds very comfortable Adjoining restaurant serves good food at reasonable prices We would stay here again

The room was both clean and comfortable with plenty of space for 2 people Great facilities however I didn t know about the fitness suite and therefore didn t have my gym gear with me Breakfast was delicious with a great selection to suit everyone Would definitely return

all good  great location and staff very helpful rooms great and spacious and bed comfy too pillows a bit too soft but thats a personal preference Beautiful hotel and very clean with a great atmosphere

Just would ve loved to have more time in the executive lounge and just that they would ve remembered my request about it being out anniversary   Was perfect in every aspect met all my requirements Staff were on point always and happy to help with any queries

Some of the staff was not very helpful and not understanding Making it our fault they did not have a room according to our order and trying to be nice as if they were doing us a favor when finding another room that was according to our booking We had seen some feedback from geust getting cakes and welcome gifts when there was a birthday or anniversary I don t know who payed them for writing that comment or feedback because that is not how it is We got neither eventhough we sent them messages through bookings as we were celebrating both As if they had never got the messages and did not expect us at all if I refer to the arrival The staff was just not helpful at all trying to make us stay a bit more comfortable eventhough we asked for it   Breakfast was great Some of the staff was helpful

Third year in a row this hotel has messed up our booking details I would never choose to stay here if it wasn t for work On check in we were also convinced to stay in accessible rooms on a newly refurbished floor The rooms were NOT newly refurbished they were simply refurbished to make them accessible by removing the bath and having accessible friendly features This type of room wasn t necessary for myself and my colleagues and were totally mis described at check in My advice would be to stick with your original room if offered this It was a busy period in the London Bridge area but even so this hotel is very over priced I d recommend the London Bridge Hotel in preference if available   The bar area and Jamie s Italian are nice If you re here for a conference the business and conference facilities are nice

Seating in the Jamie s restaurant we were initially seated next to a young family on a bench seat We asked to be moved to a table with our own seats Who wants to share dinner with a family you don t know   Gorgeous hotel in a gorgeous location just a few minutes from the Thames Tower Bridge and the Shard The Jamie s Italian restaurant for breakfast was a treat
I had to ask for a bathrobe Maid knocked on the door at 10 to 9 am Mini bar was checked and restocked at 9 am I was trying to get dressed  Space big bathroom breakfast

We weren t disappointed by anything at the hotel only the amount of roadworks and construction going on outside but obviously not the hotels fault   We enjoyed the luxury feel of the hotel without feeling uncomfortable as in other places you can feel intimidated The staff were excellent and unobtrusive while always being on hand and available to help
Not much of a view from rooms  We stayed here London marathon weekend perfect location to atractions Superb breakfast and other meals provided by Jamies Italian onsite
nothing stands out for need of improvement  Room was lovely breakfast good Also appreciate the complimentary bottle of water We also ordered late room service the food was fab
Nothing  We upgraded and the executive room was fabulous the design of the hotel is very funky and cool the bar was buzzing Breakfast excellent Staff superb couldn t fault a thing highly recommend
The room was roomy and the facilities were great The bed was very comfortable and the room was clean and tidy The staff were very pleasant and helpful and Jamie s Italian within the hotel was great

The pillows on the bed need replacing The attached restaurant needs refreshing but food was good and the staff were great  Really pleased with the hotel Ideal location for our plans on this visit Pleasant staff Very clean
Minor problem the level access shower flooded the bathroom  All the staff were excellent The location was good but nice and quiet in the room Breakfast was of good quality with a reasonable choice
Couldn t work the aircon the tv didn t work properly to start off with and you couldn t turn on bathroom light without turning on the main lights

No Car Park we knew that and made alternative arrangements however it needs to be recorded as a downside Please note there is a small area by the entrance foyer where you can leave the car for the time it takes to check in so there is no worry carrying car luggage   Great Breakfast in the Jamies Restaurant attached to the hotel Upgrade to Executive and then enjoy complimentary drinks in the Exec lounge

hotel restroom facilities have been used by tourists walking by When we tried to use them an Italian school class was occupying it Quiet unusual maybe this is due to the fact that the hotel staff by the way very helpful is Italian too   Breakfast area was very nice and the buffet time was extended for late morning arrivals

The beds were too hard and the pillows flattened too much which meant we kept waking up and having to shift positions because we were getting too stiff and achey   The hospitality and bathroom facilities were excellent and any requests we had were met promptly Also the beds in the twin room were a great size

The reception staff very unhelpful when I told them I booked a room with a sofa bed Only double room left in hotel After much deliberation we took the room anyway to find it did actually have an extra bed in the room
Price of a gin and tonic in the bar   The breakfast was great I myself am vegetarian and gluten and dairy intolerant which was catered to on my request

Better wifi availability within rooms Appeared to be a bit patchy at times suffering from regular dropouts   Two rooms booked family members so finding we were allocated interconnecting rooms on arrival was a very pleasant surprise Very quick to react to and fix a slight issue in the bathroom Also the availability to store luggage both before allocation of rooms and after checkout was invaluable
Mini fridge made an annoying and constant mechanical whining sound Thank goodness I had a white noise sound machine   Great location near a major station and outdoor market

It was a good location for The Shard and for Southbank which was our main purpose for our trip So location from that perspective was perfect for us but we would look elsewhere for our next trip to London purely down to the location only being good for those attractions in my opinion We didn t use any of the amenities in the hotel check in and out was pleasant enough the room was an average size but the bathroom was lovely and big its nice to have a bath with option of a shower Could probably fit a stand alone shower in that bathroom which would be good as opposed to shower over the bath
I would of liked a better view especially of the Shard as I took my husband there for lunch for his 60th birthday  The bar area was really nice friendly staff and cool music

The staff in Jamies for breakfast weren t very friendly and abrupt   Bar staff were really lovely and so were the front desk Room was immaculate and very comfortable Hotel was clean and spacious and inviting We would definitely stay again

We always look for a new accommodation surrounding stPauls Southwark with proximity of the Thames Good beds no noise though we faced the works of London Bridge rail and view to the Shard Definitely we ll be back

As above ref room but not a major issue   Staff were excellent especially Bally and the lady that cleaned the room sorry can t remember her name Slight mix up with the room as someone was in it Mistake cleared up quickly and new room allocated with no fuss
Customer service was the best which me and friends really liked about It was just 5 10 mins walk to Shard where we had a dinner and the view was amazing from our room

Finding ourselves locked out of the hotel when we returned from an evening out It took around 10 mins to get in as there was nobody in the lobby Whilst security is obviously important there is no circumstances where it is acceptable to leave guests waiting in the street late at night   Excellent breakfast comfortable rooms

Informing the hotel that it was my birthday they welcomed us with an upgrade of room there were balloons card and sprinkles on our bed and also cakes were sent to our room A lovely thoughtful surprise

It s sort of half a Hilton with the restaurant and bar area seemingly outsourced They re still good but as a result their main target seems to be drawing in non guests There is often overly loud club style music audible in the entire public area leaving little relaxation space   Breakfast at Jamie s Italian was very good Wi Fi was reliable rooms comfortable Well presented hotel

I was charged 50 safety deposit without my knowledge the staff did not mention this at check in or check out which I think is really unprofessional I had to call them to find out what it was for The breakfast was good with a varied choice but because it was a buffet some of it was cold would be fine of course but for what you are paying you would expect a higher standard Basically you stay at this hotel for the amazing location and nothing else Be warned though they are currently constructing a new part of London Bridge station which is opposite the hotel they work at weekends and through the night and it s noisy no Sunday lie in that is for sure Try and request a room away from the street if you can
I asked him to give my a good view but they don t and the wi if is very bad and I told the front desk about this issue  Location comfort clean staff
Not much I can think about   The bed was exceptionally comfy as per usual at Hilton The service from staff at the bar was fantastic with a great Italian accent to go with it

No power points on the bedhead wall which I need for medical reasons I needed to borrow an extension lead which then ran across the access to the bathroom A trip hazard at night particularly  Great Location comfortable and helpful friendly staff
Car park was hard to find long way from hotel  The new rooms were excellent Very friendly pleasant helpful staff Great Guy on the bar from Malaga Spain makes great cocktails
Would have liked to stay longer but couldn t afford it   Executive lounge Views from the roof terrace Helpfulness of the staff Comfy bed large room and bathroom
Bed wasn t as good as other Hilton hotels only 2 pillows   Nice clean hotel Staff all extremely pleasant helpful Good location directly opposite The Shard

I was charged 15 pounds extra over the rate from booking just before I arrived and no one from the staff knows why  I upgraded to executive room with access to executive lounge Was good with snacks and coffee and quiet place The hotel is clean and safe and the area is very nice
when we arrived our room stank of sewage reception sent a cleaner up with an airfreshener obviously as I was paying 350 for 2 nights that is not on and a new room was found

Paid extra for vip room access Was underwhelming to be honest Lots of people crammed in a small room with heating too high Would have preferred using the spacious bar downstairs which looked far more luxurious   Room was very nice and looked recently built Bathroom was a decent size And all fixtures and fittings were nice quality
The breakfast was not the best to be honest Also only one bath roab in the room   Location was great also Jamie s Italian which is located inside the hotel was superb

The in house catering is provided by Jamie Oliver s enterprise Suggest you book for a weekend evening meal as many non residents eat there This was not mentioned to u s so we had to wait about an hour for a table for 2 on Saturday For what you get the food is a bit expensive but you are paying for the name and London location   Location was ideal 5 minute walk from London Bridge Railway Underground stations Close to the Shard London Bridge HMS Belfast St Pauls and much much more All staff very friendly and helpful
Ice machine in hallway did not work Breakfast was nice but served on cold plates   Freshly re furbished room Comfy bed and plenty of space Friendly staff and very clean

There was a lot of noise in the night outside groups of people singing etc at 1 30am 2 30am which woke me a few times Not really your fault windows were double glazed but spoilt the experience   The staff were very friendly and helpful

there was drilling intermittently during the day Friday and drilling again at 9 30am saturday No fridge for my husbands medication had to request use of locked cooler fridge which Manager did oblige He did offer to bring a fridge to the room but why not have a fridge in the room   Room very clean and comfortable staff helpful good location

A lot of noise from building new station even at 2am As a result of this rebuilding taxi could get no nearer than a 5 minute walk to hotel and after paying 25 from Paddington was annoying  Good breakfast in Jamies Room as good as expected as it was the Hilton

As soon as we got in the room there was a awful high pitched noise coming from the bathroom I called down to reception straight away They sent someone up who told me it was probably just air in the pipe and if it happens again just run the taps for a bit not really the response I expected from a premium chain of hotels It did happen Again and again It was ear piercing and it went on through the night I didn t want to ring down to reception again as I didn t feel I was being taken seriously All in all a very disappointing stay   Lovely hotel in a great location Easily accessible by tube Nice bar and one of the best breakfasts i have ever had

Rude staff There was a mouse running around freely in the lounge restaurant area Air con heating far too loud I asked for a taxi to get to my meeting After 15 minutes realised she hadn t even called it
The location was ideal only a few minutes from London Bridge Station Few minutes walk took us to the river taxi which we used to take us to the 02 ideal for us Husband unable to walk far

The air con broke all weekend and jamie s restaurant was really unbearable to the point I was too hot to eat Think there could have been notice to customers when they booked or complimentary drink  Bed was extremely comfy free water is fab for me as having had radiotherapy I have no saliva glands so I need water with me at all times
Nothing although would have like robes so easier for shower   We had a lovely stay the staff were fantastic and made us feel so welcome a clean and lovely hotel
Breakfast could have a larger variety  Very clean amazingly helpful staff and great location only 5mins walking distance from the London Bridge tube station

Two Ruba bar service was terrible Jamies Italian restaurant breakfast was all cold on Sunday it was only 9 30 am no croissants left The service was terrible For me the let down was how management did not have a clue to run a hotel   The check in person upgraded our room because it was our 22 nd wedding Anniversary

The lighting in the room wasn t always enough the incidental lighting was fine however the master switch was complicated At times I needed full lighting Also switching the air con and adjusting the heating was nigh on impossible   I liked the way housekeeping tidied generally all the staff were smiley helpful and efficient
